41//-------------------------------------------------------------------
42
43static std::vector<QCString> split(const QCString &str,const QCString &sep,
44 bool allowEmptyEntries=FALSE,bool cleanup=TRUE)
45{
46 std::vector<QCString> lst;
47
48 int j = 0;
49 int i = str.find( sep, j );
50
51 while (i!=-1)
52 {
53 if ( str.mid(j,i-j).length() > 0 )
54 {
55 if (cleanup)
56 {
57 lst.push_back(str.mid(j,i-j).stripWhiteSpace());
58 }
59 else
60 {
61 lst.push_back(str.mid(j,i-j));
62 }
63 }
64 else if (allowEmptyEntries)
65 {
66 lst.push_back("");
67 }
68 j = i + sep.length();
69 i = str.find(sep,j);
70 }
71
72 int l = str.length() - 1;
73 if (str.mid(j,l-j+1).length()>0)
74 {
75 if (cleanup)
76 {
77 lst.push_back(str.mid(j,l-j+1).stripWhiteSpace());
78 }
79 else
80 {
81 lst.push_back(str.mid(j,l-j+1));
82 }
83 }
84 else if (allowEmptyEntries)
85 {
86 lst.push_back("");
87 }
88
89 return lst;
90}
91
92//----------------------------------------------------------------------------
93
94/** Strips spaces surrounding `=` from string \a in, so
95 * `foo = 10 bar=5 baz= 'hello'` will become `foo=10 bar=5 baz='hello'`
96 */
97static void removeSpacesAroundEquals(QCString &s)
98{
99 //printf(">removeSpacesAroundEquals(%s)\n",qPrint(s));
100 uint32_t i=0, dstIdx=0, l=s.length();
101 while (i<l)
102 {
103 char c = s[i++];
104 if (c==' ')
105 {
106 bool found=false;
107 // look ahead for space or '='
108 uint32_t j=i;
109 while (j<l && (s[j]==' '|| s[j]=='='))
110 {
111 if (s[j]=='=') found=true;
112 j++;
113 }
114 if (found) // found a '=', write it without spaces
115 {
116 c = '=';
117 i=j;
118 }
119 }
120 s[dstIdx++]=c;
121 }
122 s.resize(dstIdx+1);
123 //printf("<removeSpacesAroundEquals(%s)\n",qPrint(s));
124}
125

127
128//- Template struct & list forward declarations ------------------------------
129
130class TemplateStruct;
131using TemplateStructPtr = std::shared_ptr<TemplateStruct>;
132
133/** @brief Default implementation of a context value of type struct. */
134class TemplateStruct : public TemplateStructIntf
135{
136 public:
137 // TemplateStructIntf methods
138 virtual TemplateVariant get(const QCString &name) const;
139 virtual StringVector fields() const;
140
141 /** Creates an instance and returns a shared pointer to it */
142 static TemplateStructPtr alloc();
143
144 /** Sets the value the field of a struct
145 * @param[in] name The name of the field.
146 * @param[in] v The value to set.
147 */
148 virtual void set(const QCString &name,const TemplateVariant &v);
149
150 /** Removes the field from the struct */
151 virtual void remove(const QCString &name);
152
153 /** Creates a struct */
154 TemplateStruct() = default; //{ printf("%p:TemplateStruct::TemplateStruct()\n",(void*)this); }
155 /** Destroys the struct */
156 virtual ~TemplateStruct() = default; //{ printf("%p:TemplateStruct::~TemplateStruct()\n",(void*)this); }
157
158 private:
159
160 std::unordered_map<std::string,TemplateVariant> m_fields;
161};
162
163void TemplateStruct::set(const QCString &name,const TemplateVariant &v)
164{
165 auto it = m_fields.find(name.str());
166 if (it!=m_fields.end()) // change existing field
167 {
168 it->second = v;
169 }
170 else // insert new field
171 {
172 m_fields.insert(std::make_pair(name.str(),v));
173 }
174}
175
176void TemplateStruct::remove(const QCString &name)
177{
178 auto it = m_fields.find(name.str());
179 if (it!=m_fields.end())
180 {
181 m_fields.erase(it);
182 }
183}
184
185TemplateVariant TemplateStruct::get(const QCString &name) const
186{
187 auto it = m_fields.find(name.str());
188 return it!=m_fields.end() ? it->second : TemplateVariant();
189}
190
191StringVector TemplateStruct::fields() const
192{
193 StringVector result;
194 for (const auto &[name,variant] : m_fields)
195 {
196 result.push_back(name);
197 }
198 std::sort(result.begin(),result.end());
199 return result;
200}
201
202TemplateStructPtr TemplateStruct::alloc()
203{
204 return std::make_shared<TemplateStruct>();
205}
206
207class TemplateList;
208using TemplateListPtr = std::shared_ptr<TemplateList>;
209
210//- Template list implementation ----------------------------------------------
211
212// iterator support
213template<class List>
214class TemplateListGenericConstIterator : public TemplateListIntf::ConstIterator
215{
216 public:
217 TemplateListGenericConstIterator(const List &l) : m_list(l) { m_index=0; }
218 virtual void toFirst()
219 {
220 m_index=0;
221 }
222 virtual void toLast()
223 {
224 int count = static_cast<int>(m_list.count());
225 m_index = count>0 ? count-1 : 0;
226 }
227 virtual void toNext()
228 {
229 if (m_index<static_cast<int>(m_list.count())) { m_index++; }
230 }
231 virtual void toPrev()
232 {
233 if (m_index>=0) { --m_index; }
234 }
235 virtual bool current(TemplateVariant &v) const
236 {
237 if (m_index>=0 && m_index<static_cast<int>(m_list.count()))
238 {
239 v = m_list.at(m_index);
240 return TRUE;
241 }
242 else
243 {
244 v = TemplateVariant();
245 return FALSE;
246 }
247 }
248 private:
249 const List &m_list;
250 int m_index = 0;
251};
252
253//-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
254//
255/** @brief Default implementation of a context value of type list. */
256class TemplateList : public TemplateListIntf
257{
258 public:
259 // TemplateListIntf methods
260 virtual size_t count() const
261 {
262 return m_elems.size();
263 }
264 virtual TemplateVariant at(size_t index) const
265 {
266 return index < m_elems.size() ? m_elems[static_cast<int>(index)] : TemplateVariant();
267 }
268 virtual TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr createIterator() const
269 {
270 return std::make_unique< TemplateListGenericConstIterator<TemplateList> >(*this);
271 }
272
273 /** Creates an instance and returns a shared pointer to it */
274 static TemplateListPtr alloc()
275 {
276 return std::make_shared<TemplateList>();
277 }
278
279 /** Appends element \a v to the end of the list */
280 virtual void append(const TemplateVariant &v)
281 {
282 m_elems.push_back(v);
283 }
284
285 void removeAt(size_t index)
286 {
287 if (index<m_elems.size())
288 {
289 m_elems.erase(m_elems.begin()+index);
290 }
291 }
292
293 void insertAt(size_t index,TemplateListPtr list)
294 {
295 auto it = m_elems.begin()+index;
296 m_elems.insert(it,list->m_elems.begin(),list->m_elems.end());
297 }
298
299 /** Creates a list */
300 TemplateList() = default; //{ printf("%p:TemplateList::TemplateList()\n",(void*)this); }
301 /** Destroys the list */
302 virtual ~TemplateList() = default; //{ printf("%p:TemplateList::~TemplateList()\n",(void*)this); }
303
304 private:
305 TemplateVariantList m_elems;
306};
307
308//- TemplateVariant implementation -------------------------------------------
309
310TemplateVariant::TemplateVariant(TemplateVariant &&v)
311{
312 m_raw = std::move(v.m_raw);
313 m_variant = std::move(v.m_variant);
314 v.m_variant = VariantT();
315}
316
317TemplateVariant &TemplateVariant::operator=(TemplateVariant &&v)
318{
319 m_raw = std::move(v.m_raw);
320 m_variant = std::move(v.m_variant);
321 v.m_variant = VariantT();
322 return *this;
323}
324
325bool TemplateVariant::operator==(const TemplateVariant &other) const
326{
327 if (!isValid())
328 {
329 return FALSE;
330 }
331 if (isBool() && other.isBool())
332 {
333 return std::get<bool>(m_variant) == std::get<bool>(other.m_variant);
334 }
335 else if (isInt() && other.isInt())
336 {
337 return std::get<int>(m_variant) == std::get<int>(other.m_variant);
338 }
339 else if (isList() && other.isList())
340 {
341 return toList() == other.toList();
342 }
343 else if ((isStruct() || isWeakStruct()) && (other.isStruct() || other.isWeakStruct()))
344 {
345 return toStruct() == other.toStruct();
346 }
347 return toString()==other.toString();
348}
349
350bool TemplateVariant::toBool() const
351{
352 switch (type())
353 {
354 case Type::None: return false;
355 case Type::Bool: return std::get<bool>(m_variant);
356 case Type::Int: return std::get<int>(m_variant)!=0;
357 case Type::String: return !std::get<QCString>(m_variant).isEmpty();
358 case Type::Struct: return true;
359 case Type::List: return std::get<TemplateListIntfPtr>(m_variant)->count()!=0;
360 case Type::Function: return false;
361 case Type::WeakStruct: return true;
362 }
363 return FALSE;
364}
365
366int TemplateVariant::toInt() const
367{
368 switch (type())
369 {
370 case Type::None: return 0;
371 case Type::Bool: return std::get<bool>(m_variant) ? 1 : 0;
372 case Type::Int: return std::get<int>(m_variant);
373 case Type::String: return std::get<QCString>(m_variant).toInt();
374 case Type::Struct: return 0;
375 case Type::List: return static_cast<int>(std::get<TemplateListIntfPtr>(m_variant)->count());
376 case Type::Function: return 0;
377 case Type::WeakStruct: return 0;
378 }
379 return 0;
380}
381
382QCString TemplateVariant::toString() const
383{
384 switch (type())
385 {
386 case Type::None: return QCString();
387 case Type::Bool: return std::get<bool>(m_variant) ? "true" : "false";
388 case Type::Int: return QCString().setNum(std::get<int>(m_variant));
389 case Type::String: return std::get<QCString>(m_variant);
390 case Type::Struct: return structToString();
391 case Type::List: return listToString();
392 case Type::Function: return "[function]";
393 case Type::WeakStruct: return structToString();
394 }
395 return QCString();
396}
397
398/** Return a string representation of the type of the value stored in the variant */
399const char *TemplateVariant::typeAsString() const
400{
401 switch (type())
402 {
403 case Type::None: return "invalid";
404 case Type::Bool: return "bool";
405 case Type::Int: return "integer";
406 case Type::String: return "string";
407 case Type::Struct: return "struct";
408 case Type::List: return "list";
409 case Type::Function: return "function";
410 case Type::WeakStruct: return "struct";
411 }
412 return "invalid";
413}
414
415TemplateListIntfPtr TemplateVariant::toList()
416{
417 return isList() ? std::get<TemplateListIntfPtr>(m_variant) : nullptr;
418}
419const TemplateListIntfPtr TemplateVariant::toList() const
420{
421 return isList() ? std::get<TemplateListIntfPtr>(m_variant) : nullptr;
422}
423
424TemplateStructIntfPtr TemplateVariant::toStruct()
425{
426 return isStruct() ? std::get<TemplateStructIntfPtr>(m_variant) :
427 isWeakStruct() ? std::get<TemplateStructIntfWeakPtr>(m_variant).lock() :
428 nullptr;
429}
430const TemplateStructIntfPtr TemplateVariant::toStruct() const
431{
432 return isStruct() ? std::get<TemplateStructIntfPtr>(m_variant) :
433 isWeakStruct() ? std::get<TemplateStructIntfWeakPtr>(m_variant).lock() :
434 nullptr;
435}
436
437TemplateVariant TemplateVariant::call(const std::vector<TemplateVariant> &args)
438{
439 return isFunction() ? std::get<FunctionDelegate>(m_variant)(args) : TemplateVariant();
440}

445/** @brief Private data of a template struct object */
446class TemplateImmutableStruct::Private
447{
448 public:
449 Private(std::initializer_list<StructField> fs) : fields(fs) {}
450 std::unordered_map<std::string,TemplateVariant> fields;
451};
452
453TemplateImmutableStruct::TemplateImmutableStruct(
454 std::initializer_list<StructField> fields)
455 : p(std::make_unique<Private>(fields))
456{
457}
458
459TemplateImmutableStruct::~TemplateImmutableStruct()
460{
461}
462
463TemplateVariant TemplateImmutableStruct::get(const QCString &name) const
464{
465 auto it = p->fields.find(name.str());
466 return it!=p->fields.end() ? it->second : TemplateVariant();
467}
468
469StringVector TemplateImmutableStruct::fields() const
470{
471 StringVector result;
472 for (const auto &[name,variant] : p->fields)
473 {
474 result.push_back(name);
475 }
476 std::sort(result.begin(),result.end());
477 return result;
478}
479
480TemplateStructIntfPtr TemplateImmutableStruct::alloc(std::initializer_list<StructField> fields)
481{
482 return std::make_shared<TemplateImmutableStruct>(fields);
483}

485//- Template immutable list implementation ------------------------------------
486
487/** @brief Private data of a template immutable list object */
488class TemplateImmutableList::Private
489{
490 public:
491 Private(std::initializer_list<TemplateVariant> e) : elems(e) {}
492 Private(const TemplateVariantList &e) : elems(e) {}
493 TemplateVariantList elems;
494 int index = -1;
495};
496
497TemplateImmutableList::TemplateImmutableList(std::initializer_list<TemplateVariant> elements)
498 : p(std::make_unique<Private>(elements))
499{
500}
501
502TemplateImmutableList::TemplateImmutableList(const TemplateVariantList &elements)
503 : p(std::make_unique<Private>(elements))
504{
505}
506
507TemplateImmutableList::~TemplateImmutableList()
508{
509}
510
511size_t TemplateImmutableList::count() const
512{
513 return p->elems.size();
514}
515
516TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr TemplateImmutableList::createIterator() const
517{
518 return std::make_unique< TemplateListGenericConstIterator<TemplateImmutableList> >(*this);
519}
520
521TemplateVariant TemplateImmutableList::at(size_t index) const
522{
523 return index<p->elems.size() ? p->elems[static_cast<int>(index)] : TemplateVariant();
524}
525
526TemplateListIntfPtr TemplateImmutableList::alloc(std::initializer_list<TemplateVariant> elements)
527{
528 return std::make_shared<TemplateImmutableList>(elements);
529}
530
531TemplateListIntfPtr TemplateImmutableList::alloc(const TemplateVariantList &elements)
532{
533 return std::make_shared<TemplateImmutableList>(elements);
534}
535
536//- Operator types ------------------------------------------------------------
537
538/** @brief Class representing operators that can appear in template expressions */
539class Operator
540{
541 public:
542 /* Operator precedence (low to high)
543 or
544 and
545 not
546 in
547 ==, !=, <, >, <=, >=
548 +, -
549 *, /, %
550 |
551 :
552 ,
553 */
554 enum Type
555 {
556 Or, And, Not, In, Equal, NotEqual, Less, Greater, LessEqual,
557 GreaterEqual, Plus, Minus, Multiply, Divide, Modulo, Filter, Colon, Comma,
558 LeftParen, RightParen,
559 Last
560 };
561
562 static const char *toString(Type op)
563 {
564 switch(op)
565 {
566 case Or: return "or";
567 case And: return "and";
568 case Not: return "not";
569 case In: return "in";
570 case Equal: return "==";
571 case NotEqual: return "!=";
572 case Less: return "<";
573 case Greater: return ">";
574 case LessEqual: return "<=";
575 case GreaterEqual: return ">=";
576 case Plus: return "+";
577 case Minus: return "-";
578 case Multiply: return "*";
579 case Divide: return "/";
580 case Modulo: return "%";
581 case Filter: return "|";
582 case Colon: return ":";
583 case Comma: return ",";
584 case LeftParen: return "(";
585 case RightParen: return ")";
586 case Last: return "?";
587 }
588 return "?";
589 }
590};
591
592//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
593
594class TemplateNodeBlock;
595
596/** @brief Class holding stacks of blocks available in the context */
597class TemplateBlockContext
598{
599 public:
600 TemplateBlockContext();
601 TemplateNodeBlock *get(const QCString &name) const;
602 TemplateNodeBlock *pop(const QCString &name);
603 void add(TemplateNodeBlock *block);
604 void add(TemplateBlockContext *ctx);
605 void push(TemplateNodeBlock *block);
606 void clear();
607 using NodeBlockList = std::deque<TemplateNodeBlock*>;
608 private:
609 std::map< std::string, NodeBlockList > m_blocks;
610};
611
612/** @brief A container to store a key-value pair */
613struct TemplateKeyValue
614{
615 TemplateKeyValue() {}
616 TemplateKeyValue(const QCString &k,const TemplateVariant &v) : key(k), value(v) {}
617 QCString key;
618 TemplateVariant value;
619};
620
621/** @brief Internal class representing the implementation of a template
622 * context */
623class TemplateContextImpl : public TemplateContext
624{
625 public:
626 TemplateContextImpl(const TemplateEngine *e);
627 virtual ~TemplateContextImpl();
628
629 using EscapeIntfMap = std::unordered_map<std::string, std::unique_ptr<TemplateEscapeIntf>>;
630 void copyEscapeIntfMap(const EscapeIntfMap &map)
631 {
632 for (const auto &[name,intf] : map)
633 {
634 m_escapeIntfMap.insert(std::make_pair(name,intf->clone()));
635 }
636 }
637
638 // TemplateContext methods
639 void push();
640 void pop();
641 void set(const QCString &name,const TemplateVariant &v);
642 //void update(const QCString &name,const TemplateVariant &v);
643 TemplateVariant get(const QCString &name) const;
644 const TemplateVariant *getRef(const QCString &name) const;
645 void setOutputDirectory(const QCString &dir)
646 { m_outputDir = dir; }
647 void setEscapeIntf(const QCString &ext,std::unique_ptr<TemplateEscapeIntf> intf)
648 {
649 int i=(!ext.isEmpty() && ext.at(0)=='.') ? 1 : 0;
650 m_escapeIntfMap.insert(std::make_pair(ext.mid(i).str(),std::move(intf)));
651 }
652 void selectEscapeIntf(const QCString &ext)
653 {
654 auto it = m_escapeIntfMap.find(ext.str());
655 m_activeEscapeIntf = it!=m_escapeIntfMap.end() ? it->second.get() : 0;
656 }
657 void setActiveEscapeIntf(TemplateEscapeIntf *intf) { m_activeEscapeIntf = intf; }
658 TemplateEscapeIntf *escapeIntf() { return m_activeEscapeIntf; }
659 const TemplateEscapeIntf *escapeIntf() const { return m_activeEscapeIntf; }
660 void setSpacelessIntf(std::unique_ptr<TemplateSpacelessIntf> intf) { m_spacelessIntf = std::move(intf); }
661
662 // internal methods
663 TemplateBlockContext *blockContext();
664 TemplateVariant getPrimary(const QCString &name) const;
665 void setLocation(const QCString &templateName,int line)
666 { m_templateName=templateName; m_line=line; }
667 QCString templateName() const { return m_templateName; }
668 int line() const { return m_line; }
669 QCString outputDirectory() const { return m_outputDir; }
670 std::unique_ptr<TemplateSpacelessIntf> &spacelessIntf() { return m_spacelessIntf; }
671 const std::unique_ptr<TemplateSpacelessIntf> &spacelessInfo() const { return m_spacelessIntf; }
672 void enableSpaceless(bool b) { if (b && !m_spacelessEnabled) m_spacelessIntf->reset();
673 m_spacelessEnabled=b;
674 }
675 bool spacelessEnabled() const { return m_spacelessEnabled && m_spacelessIntf; }
676 void enableTabbing(bool b) { m_tabbingEnabled=b;
677 if (m_activeEscapeIntf) m_activeEscapeIntf->enableTabbing(b);
678 }
679 bool tabbingEnabled() const { return m_tabbingEnabled; }
680 bool needsRecoding() const { return !m_encoding.isEmpty(); }
681 QCString encoding() const { return m_encoding; }
682 void setEncoding(const QCString &file,int line,const QCString &enc);
683 QCString recode(const QCString &s);
684 void warn(const QCString &fileName,int line,const char *fmt,...) const;
685
686 // index related functions
687 void openSubIndex(const QCString &indexName);
688 void closeSubIndex(const QCString &indexName);
689 void addIndexEntry(const QCString &indexName,const std::vector<TemplateKeyValue> &arguments);
690 const TemplateStructPtr indices() const { return m_indices; }
691
692 private:
693 const TemplateEngine *m_engine = 0;
694 QCString m_templateName = "<unknown>";
695 int m_line = 1;
696 QCString m_outputDir;
697 std::deque< std::unordered_map<std::string,TemplateVariant> > m_contextStack;
698 TemplateBlockContext m_blockContext;
699 EscapeIntfMap m_escapeIntfMap;
700 TemplateEscapeIntf *m_activeEscapeIntf = 0;
701 std::unique_ptr<TemplateSpacelessIntf> m_spacelessIntf;
702 bool m_spacelessEnabled = false;
703 bool m_tabbingEnabled = false;
704 TemplateStructPtr m_indices;
705 std::unordered_map< std::string, std::stack<TemplateVariant> > m_indexStacks;
706 QCString m_encoding;
707 void *m_fromUtf8 = 0;
708};
709
710//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
711
712/** @brief The implementation of the "add" filter */
713class FilterAdd
714{
715 public:
716 static int variantIntValue(const TemplateVariant &v,bool &isInt)
717 {
718 if (!v.isInt() && v.isString())
719 {
720 return v.toString().toInt(&isInt);
721 }
722 return v.isInt() ? v.toInt() : 0;
723 }
724 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg)
725 {
726 if (!v.isValid())
727 {
728 return arg;
729 }
730 bool lhsIsInt = false;
731 int lhsValue = variantIntValue(v,lhsIsInt);
732 bool rhsIsInt = false;
733 int rhsValue = variantIntValue(arg,rhsIsInt);
734 if (lhsIsInt && rhsIsInt)
735 {
736 return lhsValue+rhsValue;
737 }
738 else if (v.isString() && arg.isString())
739 {
740 return TemplateVariant(v.toString() + arg.toString());
741 }
742 else
743 {
744 return v;
745 }
746 }
747};
748
749//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
750
751/** @brief The implementation of the "get" filter */
752class FilterGet
753{
754 public:
755 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg)
756 {
757 if (v.isValid() && (v.isStruct() || v.isWeakStruct()) && arg.isString())
758 {
759 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = v.toStruct();
760 if (s)
761 {
762 TemplateVariant result = v.toStruct()->get(arg.toString());
763 //printf("\nok[%s]=%d\n",qPrint(arg.toString()),result.type());
764 return result;
765 }
766 else
767 {
768 return false;
769 }
770 }
771 else
772 {
773 //printf("\nnok[%s]\n",qPrint(arg.toString()));
774 return false;
775 }
776 }
777};
778
779//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
780
781/** @brief The implementation of the "raw" filter */
782class FilterRaw
783{
784 public:
785 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
786 {
787 if (v.isValid() && (v.isString() || v.isInt()))
788 {
789 return TemplateVariant(v.toString(),TRUE);
790 }
791 else
792 {
793 return v;
794 }
795 }
796};
797
798//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
799
800/** @brief The implementation of the "keep" filter */
801class FilterKeep
802{
803 public:
804 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &args)
805 {
806 if (v.isValid() && (v.isList()) && args.isString())
807 {
808 TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
809 if (list)
810 {
811 //printf("FilterKeep::apply: v=%s args=%s\n",qPrint(v.toString()),qPrint(args.toString()));
812 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
813
814 TemplateListPtr result = TemplateList::alloc();
815 TemplateVariant item;
816 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(item));it->toNext())
817 {
818 //printf("item type=%s\n",item.typeAsString());
819 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = item.toStruct();
820 if (s)
821 {
822 TemplateVariant value = s->get(args.toString());
823 //printf("value type=%s\n",value.typeAsString());
824 if (value.toBool())
825 {
826 //printf("keeping it\n");
827 result->append(item);
828 }
829 else
830 {
831 //printf("Dropping it\n");
832 }
833 }
834 }
835 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(result));
836 }
837 }
838 return v;
839 }
840};
841
842//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
843
844/** @brief The implementation of the "list" filter */
845class FilterList
846{
847 public:
848 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
849 {
850 if (v.isValid())
851 {
852 if (v.isList()) // input is already a list
853 {
854 return v;
855 }
856 // create a list with v as the only element
857 TemplateListPtr list = TemplateList::alloc();
858 list->append(v);
859 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(list));
860 }
861 else
862 {
863 return v;
864 }
865 }
866};
867
868//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
869/** @brief The implementation of the "texlabel" filter */
870class FilterTexLabel
871{
872 public:
873 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
874 {
875 if (v.isValid() && (v.isString()))
876 {
877 return TemplateVariant(latexEscapeLabelName(v.toString()),TRUE);
878 }
879 else
880 {
881 return v;
882 }
883 }
884};
885
886//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
887
888/** @brief The implementation of the "texindex" filter */
889class FilterTexIndex
890{
891 public:
892 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
893 {
894 if (v.isValid() && (v.isString()))
895 {
896 return TemplateVariant(latexEscapeIndexChars(v.toString()),TRUE);
897 }
898 else
899 {
900 return v;
901 }
902 }
903};
904
905//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
906
907/** @brief The implementation of the "append" filter */
908class FilterAppend
909{
910 public:
911 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg)
912 {
913 if ((v.isString() || v.isInt()) &&
914 (arg.isString() || arg.isInt()))
915 {
916 return TemplateVariant(v.toString() + arg.toString());
917 }
918 else
919 {
920 return v;
921 }
922 }
923};
924
925//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
926
927/** @brief The implementation of the "prepend" filter */
928class FilterPrepend
929{
930 public:
931 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg)
932 {
933 if ((v.isString() || v.isInt()) &&
934 arg.isString())
935 {
936 return TemplateVariant(arg.toString() + v.toString());
937 }
938 else
939 {
940 return v;
941 }
942 }
943};
944
945//--------------------------------------------------------------------
946
947/** @brief The implementation of the "length" filter */
948class FilterLength
949{
950 public:
951 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
952 {
953 if (!v.isValid())
954 {
955 return TemplateVariant();
956 }
957 if (v.isList())
958 {
959 return TemplateVariant(v.toList()->count());
960 }
961 else if (v.isString())
962 {
963 return TemplateVariant(v.toString().length());
964 }
965 else
966 {
967 return TemplateVariant();
968 }
969 }
970};
971
972//--------------------------------------------------------------------
973
974/** @brief The implementation of the "default" filter */
975class FilterDefault
976{
977 public:
978 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg)
979 {
980 if (!v.isValid())
981 {
982 return arg;
983 }
984 else if (v.isString() && v.toString().isEmpty())
985 {
986 return arg;
987 }
988 else
989 {
990 return v;
991 }
992 }
993};
994
995//--------------------------------------------------------------------
996
997/** @brief The implementation of the "flatten" filter */
998class FilterFlatten
999{
1000 public:
1001 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1002 {
1003 if (!v.isValid() || !v.isList())
1004 {
1005 return v;
1006 }
1007 else
1008 {
1009 TemplateListPtr list = TemplateList::alloc();
1010 TemplateListIntfPtr tree = v.toList();
1011 flatten(tree,list);
1012 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(list));
1013 }
1014 }
1015
1016 private:
1017 static void flatten(const TemplateListIntfPtr tree,TemplateListPtr list)
1018 {
1019 if (tree)
1020 {
1021 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = tree->createIterator();
1022 TemplateVariant item;
1023 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(item));it->toNext())
1024 {
1025 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = item.toStruct();
1026 if (s)
1027 {
1028 list->append(item);
1029 // if s has "children" then recurse into the children
1030 TemplateVariant children = s->get("children");
1031 if (children.isValid() && children.isList())
1032 {
1033 flatten(children.toList(),list);
1034 }
1035 }
1036 else
1037 {
1038 list->append(item);
1039 }
1040 }
1041 }
1042 }
1043};
1044
1045//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1046
1047/** @brief The implementation of the "listsort" filter */
1048class FilterListSort
1049{
1050 struct ListElem
1051 {
1052 ListElem(const QCString &k,const TemplateVariant &v) : key(k), value(v) {}
1053 QCString key;
1054 TemplateVariant value;
1055 };
1056 public:
1057 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &args)
1058 {
1059 if (v.isList() && args.isString())
1060 {
1061 //printf("FilterListSort::apply: v=%s args=%s\n",qPrint(v.toString()),qPrint(args.toString()));
1062 TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
1063 if (list)
1064 {
1065 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
1066
1067 TemplateVariant item;
1068 TemplateListPtr result = TemplateList::alloc();
1069
1070 // create list of items based on v using the data in args as a sort key
1071 using SortList = std::vector<ListElem>;
1072 SortList sortList;
1073 sortList.reserve(v.toList()->count());
1074 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(item));it->toNext())
1075 {
1076 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = item.toStruct();
1077 if (s)
1078 {
1079 QCString sortKey = determineSortKey(s,args.toString());
1080 sortList.emplace_back(sortKey,item);
1081 //printf("sortKey=%s\n",qPrint(sortKey));
1082 }
1083 }
1084
1085 // sort the list
1086 std::sort(sortList.begin(),
1087 sortList.end(),
1088 [](const auto &lhs,const auto &rhs) { return lhs.key < rhs.key; });
1089
1090 // add sorted items to the result list
1091 for (const auto &elem : sortList)
1092 {
1093 result->append(elem.value);
1094 }
1095 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(result));
1096 }
1097 }
1098 return v;
1099 }
1100
1101 private:
1102 static QCString determineSortKey(const TemplateStructIntfPtr s,const QCString &arg)
1103 {
1104 int i,p=0;
1105 QCString result;
1106 while ((i=arg.find("{{",p))!=-1)
1107 {
1108 result+=arg.mid(p,i-p);
1109 int j=arg.find("}}",i+2);
1110 if (j!=-1)
1111 {
1112 QCString var = arg.mid(i+2,j-i-2);
1113 TemplateVariant val=s->get(var);
1114 //printf("found argument %s value=%s\n",qPrint(var),qPrint(val.toString()));
1115 result+=val.toString();
1116 p=j+2;
1117 }
1118 else
1119 {
1120 p=i+1;
1121 }
1122 }
1123 result+=arg.right(arg.length()-p);
1124 return result;
1125 }
1126};
1127
1128//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1129
1130/** @brief The implementation of the "groupBy" filter */
1131class FilterGroupBy
1132{
1133 struct ListElem
1134 {
1135 ListElem(const QCString &k,const TemplateVariant &v) : key(k), value(v) {}
1136 QCString key;
1137 TemplateVariant value;
1138 };
1139 public:
1140 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &args)
1141 {
1142 if (v.isList() && args.isString())
1143 {
1144 TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
1145 if (list)
1146 {
1147 //printf("FilterListSort::apply: v=%s args=%s\n",qPrint(v.toString()),qPrint(args.toString()));
1148 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
1149
1150 TemplateVariant item;
1151 TemplateListPtr result = TemplateList::alloc();
1152
1153 // create list of items based on v using the data in args as a sort key
1154 using SortList = std::vector<ListElem>;
1155 SortList sortList;
1156 sortList.reserve(v.toList()->count());
1157 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(item));it->toNext())
1158 {
1159 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = item.toStruct();
1160 if (s)
1161 {
1162 QCString sortKey = determineSortKey(s,args.toString());
1163 sortList.emplace_back(sortKey,item);
1164 //printf("sortKey=%s\n",qPrint(sortKey));
1165 }
1166 }
1167
1168 // sort the list
1169 std::sort(sortList.begin(),
1170 sortList.end(),
1171 [](const auto &lhs,const auto &rhs) { return lhs.key < rhs.key; });
1172
1173 // add sorted items to the result list
1174 TemplateListPtr groupList;
1175 QCString prevKey;
1176 for (const auto &elem : sortList)
1177 {
1178 if (groupList==0 || elem.key!=prevKey)
1179 {
1180 groupList = TemplateList::alloc();
1181 result->append(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(groupList));
1182 prevKey = elem.key;
1183 }
1184 groupList->append(elem.value);
1185 }
1186 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(result));
1187 }
1188 }
1189 return v;
1190 }
1191
1192 private:
1193 static QCString determineSortKey(const TemplateStructIntfPtr s,const QCString &attribName)
1194 {
1195 TemplateVariant v = s->get(attribName);
1196 return v.toString();
1197 }
1198};
1199
1200//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1201
1202/** @brief The implementation of the "relative" filter */
1203class FilterRelative
1204{
1205 public:
1206 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1207 {
1208 if (v.isValid() && v.isString() && v.toString().startsWith(".."))
1209 {
1210 return TRUE;
1211 }
1212 else
1213 {
1214 return FALSE;
1215 }
1216 }
1217};
1218
1219//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1220
1221/** @brief The implementation of the "paginate" filter */
1222class FilterPaginate
1223{
1224 public:
1225 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &args)
1226 {
1227 if (v.isValid() && v.isList() &&
1228 args.isValid() && args.isInt())
1229 {
1230 int pageSize = args.toInt();
1231 const TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
1232 TemplateListPtr result = TemplateList::alloc();
1233 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
1234 TemplateVariant item;
1235 TemplateListPtr pageList;
1236 int i = 0;
1237 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(item));it->toNext())
1238 {
1239 if (pageList==0)
1240 {
1241 pageList = TemplateList::alloc();
1242 result->append(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(pageList));
1243 }
1244 pageList->append(item);
1245 i++;
1246 if (i==pageSize) // page is full start a new one
1247 {
1248 pageList=0;
1249 i=0;
1250 }
1251 }
1252 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(result));
1253 }
1254 else // wrong arguments
1255 {
1256 return v;
1257 }
1258 }
1259};
1260
1261//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1262
1263/** @brief The implementation of the "alphaIndex" filter */
1264class FilterAlphaIndex
1265{
1266 private:
1267 struct ListElem
1268 {
1269 ListElem(const std::string &k,const TemplateVariant &v) : key(k), value(v) {}
1270 std::string key;
1271 TemplateVariant value;
1272 };
1273 static QCString keyToLabel(const char *startLetter)
1274 {
1275 //printf(">keyToLabel(%s)\n",qPrint(startLetter));
1276 const char *p = startLetter;
1277 char c = *p;
1278 QCString result;
1279 if (c<127 && c>31) // printable ASCII character
1280 {
1281 result+=c;
1282 }
1283 else
1284 {
1285 result="0x";
1286 const char hex[]="0123456789abcdef";
1287 while ((c=*p++))
1288 {
1289 result+=hex[static_cast<unsigned char>(c)>>4];
1290 result+=hex[static_cast<unsigned char>(c)&0xf];
1291 }
1292 }
1293 //printf("<keyToLabel(%s)\n",qPrint(result));
1294 return result;
1295 }
1296 static std::string determineSortKey(const TemplateStructIntfPtr s,const QCString &attribName)
1297 {
1298 TemplateVariant v = s->get(attribName);
1299 int index = getPrefixIndex(v.toString());
1300 return convertUTF8ToUpper(getUTF8CharAt(v.toString().str(),index));
1301 }
1302
1303 public:
1304 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &args)
1305 {
1306 if (v.isList() && args.isString())
1307 {
1308 TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
1309 if (list)
1310 {
1311 //printf("FilterListSort::apply: v=%s args=%s\n",qPrint(v.toString()),qPrint(args.toString()));
1312 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
1313
1314 TemplateVariant item;
1315 TemplateListPtr result = TemplateList::alloc();
1316
1317 // create list of items based on v using the data in args as a sort key
1318 using SortList = std::vector<ListElem>;
1319 SortList sortList;
1320 sortList.reserve(v.toList()->count());
1321 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(item));it->toNext())
1322 {
1323 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = item.toStruct();
1324 if (s)
1325 {
1326 std::string sortKey = determineSortKey(s,args.toString());
1327 sortList.emplace_back(sortKey,item);
1328 //printf("sortKey=%s\n",qPrint(sortKey));
1329 }
1330 }
1331
1332 // sort the list
1333 std::sort(sortList.begin(),
1334 sortList.end(),
1335 [](const auto &lhs,const auto &rhs) { return lhs.key < rhs.key; });
1336
1337 // create an index from the sorted list
1338 std::string letter;
1339 TemplateStructPtr indexNode;
1340 TemplateListPtr indexList;
1341 for (const auto &elem : sortList)
1342 {
1343 if (letter!=elem.key || indexNode==0)
1344 {
1345 // create new indexNode
1346 indexNode = TemplateStruct::alloc();
1347 indexList = TemplateList::alloc();
1348 indexNode->set("letter", elem.key);
1349 indexNode->set("label", keyToLabel(elem.key.c_str()));
1350 indexNode->set("items",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(indexList));
1351 result->append(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(indexNode));
1352 letter=elem.key;
1353 }
1354 indexList->append(elem.value);
1355 }
1356 return TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(result));
1357 }
1358 }
1359 return v;
1360 }
1361};
1362
1363//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1364
1365/** @brief The implementation of the "default" filter */
1366class FilterStripPath
1367{
1368 public:
1369 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1370 {
1371 if (!v.isValid() || !v.isString())
1372 {
1373 return v;
1374 }
1375 QCString result = v.toString();
1376 int i=result.findRev('/');
1377 if (i!=-1)
1378 {
1379 result=result.mid(i+1);
1380 }
1381 i=result.findRev('\\');
1382 if (i!=-1)
1383 {
1384 result=result.mid(i+1);
1385 }
1386 return result;
1387 }
1388};
1389
1390//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1391
1392/** @brief The implementation of the "default" filter */
1393class FilterNoWrap
1394{
1395 public:
1396 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1397 {
1398 if (!v.isValid() || !v.isString())
1399 {
1400 return v;
1401 }
1402 QCString s = v.toString();
1403 return substitute(s," ","&#160;");
1404 }
1405};
1406
1407//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1408
1409/** @brief The implementation of the "divisibleby" filter */
1410class FilterDivisibleBy
1411{
1412 public:
1413 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &n)
1414 {
1415 if (!v.isValid() || !n.isValid())
1416 {
1417 return TemplateVariant();
1418 }
1419 if (v.isInt() && n.isInt())
1420 {
1421 int ni = n.toInt();
1422 if (ni>0)
1423 {
1424 return TemplateVariant((v.toInt()%ni)==0);
1425 }
1426 else
1427 {
1428 return TemplateVariant(FALSE);
1429 }
1430 }
1431 else
1432 {
1433 return TemplateVariant();
1434 }
1435 }
1436};
1437
1438//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1439
1440/** @brief The implementation of the "isRelativeURL" filter */
1441class FilterIsRelativeURL
1442{
1443 public:
1444 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1445 {
1446 if (v.isValid() && v.isString())
1447 {
1448 QCString s = v.toString();
1449 if (!s.isEmpty() && s.at(0)=='!') return TRUE;
1450 }
1451 return FALSE;
1452 }
1453};
1454
1455//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1456
1457/** @brief The implementation of the "isRelativeURL" filter */
1458class FilterIsAbsoluteURL
1459{
1460 public:
1461 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1462 {
1463 if (v.isValid() && v.isString())
1464 {
1465 QCString s = v.toString();
1466 if (!s.isEmpty() && s.at(0)=='^') return TRUE;
1467 }
1468 return FALSE;
1469 }
1470};
1471
1472//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1473
1474/** @brief The implementation of the "lower" filter */
1475class FilterLower
1476{
1477 public:
1478 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1479 {
1480 if (v.isValid() && v.isString())
1481 {
1482 return v.toString().lower();
1483 }
1484 return v;
1485 }
1486};
1487
1488//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1489
1490/** @brief The implementation of the "upper" filter */
1491class FilterUpper
1492{
1493 public:
1494 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1495 {
1496 if (v.isValid() && v.isString())
1497 {
1498 return v.toString().upper();
1499 }
1500 return v;
1501 }
1502};
1503
1504//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1505
1506/** @brief The implementation of the "upper" filter */
1507class FilterHex
1508{
1509 public:
1510 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1511 {
1512 if (v.isValid())
1513 {
1514 return QCString().sprintf("%x",v.toInt());
1515 }
1516 return v;
1517 }
1518};
1519
1520
1521//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1522
1523/** @brief The implementation of the "e" filter */
1524class FilterEscape
1525{
1526 public:
1527 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1528 {
1529 if (v.isValid() && v.isString())
1530 {
1531 return convertToHtml(v.toString());
1532 }
1533 return v;
1534 }
1535};
1536
1537
1538//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1539
1540/** @brief The implementation of the "decodeURL" filter
1541 * The leading character is removed from the value in case it is a ^ or !.
1542 * - ^ is used to encode a absolute URL
1543 * - ! is used to encode a relative URL
1544 */
1545class FilterDecodeURL
1546{
1547 public:
1548 static TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &)
1549 {
1550 if (v.isValid() && v.isString())
1551 {
1552 QCString s = v.toString();
1553 if (!s.isEmpty() && (s.at(0)=='^' || s.at(0)=='!'))
1554 {
1555 return s.mid(1);
1556 }
1557 }
1558 return v;
1559 }
1560};
1561
1562
1563//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1564
1565/** @brief Factory singleton for registering and creating filters */
1566class TemplateFilterFactory
1567{
1568 public:
1569 typedef TemplateVariant (FilterFunction)(const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg);
1570
1571 static TemplateFilterFactory &instance()
1572 {
1573 static std::unique_ptr<TemplateFilterFactory> instance;
1574 if (instance==0) instance = std::make_unique<TemplateFilterFactory>();
1575 return *instance;
1576 }
1577
1578 TemplateVariant apply(const QCString &name,const TemplateVariant &v,const TemplateVariant &arg, bool &ok)
1579 {
1580 auto it = m_registry.find(name.str());
1581 if (it!=m_registry.end())
1582 {
1583 ok=TRUE;
1584 return it->second(v,arg);
1585 }
1586 else
1587 {
1588 ok=FALSE;
1589 return v;
1590 }
1591 }
1592
1593 void registerFilter(const QCString &name,FilterFunction *func)
1594 {
1595 m_registry.insert(std::make_pair(name.str(),func));
1596 }
1597
1598 /** @brief Helper class for registering a filter function */
1599 template<class T> class AutoRegister
1600 {
1601 public:
1602 AutoRegister(const QCString &key)
1603 {
1604 TemplateFilterFactory::instance().registerFilter(key,&T::apply);
1605 }
1606 };
1607
1608 private:
1609 std::unordered_map<std::string,FilterFunction*> m_registry;
1610};
1611
1612// register a handlers for each filter we support
1613static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterAdd> fAdd("add");
1614static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterGet> fGet("get");
1615static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterHex> fHex("hex");
1616static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterRaw> fRaw("raw");
1617static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterKeep> fKeep("keep");
1618static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterList> fList("list");
1619static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterLower> fLower("lower");
1620static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterUpper> fUpper("upper");
1621static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterAppend> fAppend("append");
1622static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterEscape> fEscape("escape");
1623static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterLength> fLength("length");
1624static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterNoWrap> fNoWrap("nowrap");
1625static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterFlatten> fFlatten("flatten");
1626static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterDefault> fDefault("default");
1627static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterPrepend> fPrepend("prepend");
1628static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterGroupBy> fGroupBy("groupBy");
1629static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterRelative> fRelative("relative");
1630static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterListSort> fListSort("listsort");
1631static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterTexLabel> fTexLabel("texLabel");
1632static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterTexIndex> fTexIndex("texIndex");
1633static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterPaginate> fPaginate("paginate");
1634static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterStripPath> fStripPath("stripPath");
1635static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterDecodeURL> fDecodeURL("decodeURL");
1636static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterAlphaIndex> fAlphaIndex("alphaIndex");
1637static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterDivisibleBy> fDivisibleBy("divisibleby");
1638static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterIsRelativeURL> fIsRelativeURL("isRelativeURL");
1639static TemplateFilterFactory::AutoRegister<FilterIsAbsoluteURL> fIsAbsoluteURL("isAbsoluteURL");
1640
1641//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1642
1643/** @brief Base class for all nodes in the abstract syntax tree of an
1644 * expression.
1645 */
1646class ExprAst
1647{
1648 public:
1649 virtual ~ExprAst() = default;
1650 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *) { return TemplateVariant(); }
1651};
1652
1653using ExprAstPtr = std::unique_ptr<ExprAst>;
1654using ExprAstList = std::vector< ExprAstPtr >;
1655
1656/** @brief Class representing a number in the AST */
1657class ExprAstNumber : public ExprAst
1658{
1659 public:
1660 ExprAstNumber(int num) : m_number(num)
1661 { AUTO_TRACE("num={}",num); }
1662 int number() const { return m_number; }
1663 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *) { return TemplateVariant(m_number); }
1664 private:
1665 int m_number = 0;
1666};
1667
1668/** @brief Class representing a variable in the AST */
1669class ExprAstVariable : public ExprAst
1670{
1671 public:
1672 ExprAstVariable(const QCString &name) : m_name(name)
1673 { AUTO_TRACE("name={}",name); }
1674 const QCString &name() const { return m_name; }
1675 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *c)
1676 {
1677 TemplateVariant v = c->get(m_name);
1678 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
1679 if (!v.isValid())
1680 {
1681 if (ci) ci->warn(ci->templateName(),ci->line(),"undefined variable '%s' in expression",qPrint(m_name));
1682 }
1683 return v;
1684 }
1685 private:
1686 QCString m_name;
1687};
1688
1689class ExprAstFunctionVariable : public ExprAst
1690{
1691 public:
1692 ExprAstFunctionVariable(ExprAstPtr &&var, ExprAstList &&args)
1693 : m_var(std::move(var)), m_args(std::move(args))
1694 { AUTO_TRACE(); }
1695 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *c)
1696 {
1697 std::vector<TemplateVariant> args;
1698 for (const auto &exprArg : m_args)
1699 {
1700 TemplateVariant v = exprArg->resolve(c);
1701 args.push_back(v);
1702 }
1703 TemplateVariant v = m_var->resolve(c);
1704 if (v.isFunction())
1705 {
1706 v = v.call(args);
1707 }
1708 return v;
1709 }
1710 private:
1711 ExprAstPtr m_var;
1712 ExprAstList m_args;
1713};
1714
1715/** @brief Class representing a filter in the AST */
1716class ExprAstFilter : public ExprAst
1717{
1718 public:
1719 ExprAstFilter(const QCString &name,ExprAstPtr &&arg) : m_name(name), m_arg(std::move(arg))
1720 { AUTO_TRACE("name={}",name); }
1721 const QCString &name() const { return m_name; }
1722 TemplateVariant apply(const TemplateVariant &v,TemplateContext *c)
1723 {
1724 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
1725 if (ci==0) return v; // should not happen
1726 AUTO_TRACE("Applying filter '{}' to '{}' (type={})",m_name,v.toString(),static_cast<int>(v.type()));
1727 TemplateVariant arg;
1728 if (m_arg) arg = m_arg->resolve(c);
1729 bool ok;
1730 TemplateVariant result = TemplateFilterFactory::instance().apply(m_name,v,arg,ok);
1731 if (!ok)
1732 {
1733 ci->warn(ci->templateName(),ci->line(),"unknown filter '%s'",qPrint(m_name));
1734 }
1735 return result;
1736 }
1737 private:
1738 QCString m_name;
1739 ExprAstPtr m_arg;
1740};
1741
1742using ExprAstFilterPtr = std::unique_ptr<ExprAstFilter>;
1743
1744/** @brief Class representing a filter applied to an expression in the AST */
1745class ExprAstFilterAppl : public ExprAst
1746{
1747 public:
1748 ExprAstFilterAppl(ExprAstPtr &&expr,ExprAstFilterPtr &&filter)
1749 : m_expr(std::move(expr)), m_filter(std::move(filter))
1750 { AUTO_TRACE(); }
1751 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *c)
1752 {
1753 return m_filter->apply(m_expr->resolve(c),c);
1754 }
1755 private:
1756 ExprAstPtr m_expr;
1757 ExprAstFilterPtr m_filter;
1758};
1759
1760/** @brief Class representing a string literal in the AST */
1761class ExprAstLiteral : public ExprAst
1762{
1763 public:
1764 ExprAstLiteral(const QCString &lit) : m_literal(lit)
1765 { AUTO_TRACE("lit={}",lit); }
1766 const QCString &literal() const { return m_literal; }
1767 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *) { return TemplateVariant(m_literal); }
1768 private:
1769 QCString m_literal;
1770};
1771
1772/** @brief Class representing a negation (not) operator in the AST */
1773class ExprAstNegate : public ExprAst
1774{
1775 public:
1776 ExprAstNegate(ExprAstPtr &&expr) : m_expr(std::move(expr))
1777 { AUTO_TRACE(); }
1778 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *c)
1779 { return TemplateVariant(!m_expr->resolve(c).toBool()); }
1780 private:
1781 ExprAstPtr m_expr;
1782};
1783
1784class ExprAstUnary : public ExprAst
1785{
1786 public:
1787 ExprAstUnary(Operator::Type op,ExprAstPtr &&expr) : m_operator(op), m_expr(std::move(expr))
1788 { AUTO_TRACE("op={}",Operator::toString(op)); }
1789 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *c)
1790 {
1791 TemplateVariant expr = m_expr->resolve(c);
1792 switch (m_operator)
1793 {
1794 case Operator::Minus:
1795 return -expr.toInt();
1796 default:
1797 return TemplateVariant();
1798 }
1799 }
1800 private:
1801 Operator::Type m_operator = Operator::Or;
1802 ExprAstPtr m_expr;
1803};
1804
1805/** @brief Class representing a binary operator in the AST */
1806class ExprAstBinary : public ExprAst
1807{
1808 public:
1809 ExprAstBinary(Operator::Type op,ExprAstPtr &&lhs,ExprAstPtr &&rhs)
1810 : m_operator(op), m_lhs(std::move(lhs)), m_rhs(std::move(rhs))
1811 { AUTO_TRACE("op={}",Operator::toString(op)); }
1812 virtual TemplateVariant resolve(TemplateContext *c)
1813 {
1814 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
1815 if (ci==0) return TemplateVariant(); // should not happen
1816 TemplateVariant lhs = m_lhs->resolve(c);
1817 TemplateVariant rhs = m_rhs ? m_rhs->resolve(c) : TemplateVariant();
1818 switch(m_operator)
1819 {
1820 case Operator::Or:
1821 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toBool() || rhs.toBool());
1822 case Operator::And:
1823 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toBool() && rhs.toBool());
1824 case Operator::Equal:
1825 return TemplateVariant(lhs == rhs);
1826 case Operator::NotEqual:
1827 return TemplateVariant(!(lhs == rhs));
1828 case Operator::Less:
1829 if (lhs.isString() && rhs.isString())
1830 {
1831 return lhs.toString()<rhs.toString();
1832 }
1833 else
1834 {
1835 return lhs.toInt()<rhs.toInt();
1836 }
1837 case Operator::Greater:
1838 if (lhs.isString() && rhs.isString())
1839 {
1840 return !(lhs.toString()<rhs.toString());
1841 }
1842 else
1843 {
1844 return lhs.toInt()>rhs.toInt();
1845 }
1846 case Operator::LessEqual:
1847 if (lhs.isString() && rhs.isString())
1848 {
1849 return lhs.toString()==rhs.toString() || lhs.toString()<rhs.toString();
1850 }
1851 else
1852 {
1853 return lhs.toInt()<=rhs.toInt();
1854 }
1855 case Operator::GreaterEqual:
1856 if (lhs.isString() && rhs.isString())
1857 {
1858 return lhs.toString()==rhs.toString() || !(lhs.toString()<rhs.toString());
1859 }
1860 else
1861 {
1862 return lhs.toInt()>=rhs.toInt();
1863 }
1864 case Operator::Plus:
1865 {
1866 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toInt() + rhs.toInt());
1867 }
1868 case Operator::Minus:
1869 {
1870 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toInt() - rhs.toInt());
1871 }
1872 case Operator::Multiply:
1873 {
1874 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toInt() * rhs.toInt());
1875 }
1876 case Operator::Divide:
1877 {
1878 int denom = rhs.toInt();
1879 if (denom!=0)
1880 {
1881 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toInt() / denom);
1882 }
1883 else // divide by zero
1884 {
1885 ci->warn(ci->templateName(),ci->line(),"division by zero while evaluating expression is undefined");
1886 return 0;
1887 }
1888 }
1889 case Operator::Modulo:
1890 {
1891 int denom = rhs.toInt();
1892 if (denom!=0)
1893 {
1894 return TemplateVariant(lhs.toInt() % denom);
1895 }
1896 else // module zero
1897 {
1898 ci->warn(ci->templateName(),ci->line(),"modulo zero while evaluating expression is undefined");
1899 return 0;
1900 }
1901 }
1902 default:
1903 return TemplateVariant();
1904 }
1905 }
1906 private:
1907 Operator::Type m_operator = Operator::Or;
1908 ExprAstPtr m_lhs;
1909 ExprAstPtr m_rhs;
1910};
1911
1912//----------------------------------------------------------
1913
1914/** @brief Base class of all nodes in a template's AST */
1915class TemplateNode
1916{
1917 public:
1918 TemplateNode(TemplateNode *parent) : m_parent(parent) {}
1919 virtual ~TemplateNode() = default;
1920
1921 virtual void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c) = 0;
1922
1923 TemplateNode *parent() { return m_parent; }
1924
1925 private:
1926 TemplateNode *m_parent = 0;
1927};
1928
1929using TemplateNodePtr = std::unique_ptr<TemplateNode>;
1930
1931//----------------------------------------------------------
1932
1933/** @brief Class representing a lexical token in a template */
1934class TemplateToken
1935{
1936 public:
1937 enum Type { Text, Variable, Block };
1938 TemplateToken(Type t,const QCString &d,int l) : type(t), data(d), line(l) {}
1939 Type type = Text;
1940 QCString data;
1941 int line = 0;
1942};
1943
1944using TemplateTokenPtr = std::unique_ptr<TemplateToken>;
1945using TemplateTokenStream = std::deque< TemplateTokenPtr >;
1946
1947//----------------------------------------------------------
1948
1949/** @brief Class representing a list of AST nodes in a template */
1950class TemplateNodeList : public std::vector< TemplateNodePtr >
1951{
1952 public:
1953 void render(TextStream &ts,TemplateContext *c)
1954 {
1955 AUTO_TRACE();
1956 for (const auto &tn : *this)
1957 {
1958 tn->render(ts,c);
1959 }
1960 }
1961};
1962
1963//----------------------------------------------------------
1964
1965/** @brief Parser for templates */
1966class TemplateParser
1967{
1968 public:
1969 TemplateParser(const TemplateEngine *engine,
1970 const QCString &templateName,
1971 TemplateTokenStream &tokens);
1972 void parse(TemplateNode *parent,int line,const StringVector &stopAt,
1973 TemplateNodeList &nodes);
1974 bool hasNextToken() const;
1975 TemplateTokenPtr takeNextToken();
1976 void removeNextToken();
1977 void prependToken(TemplateTokenPtr &&token);
1978 const TemplateToken *currentToken() const;
1979 QCString templateName() const { return m_templateName; }
1980 void warn(const QCString &fileName,int line,const char *fmt,...) const;
1981 private:
1982 const TemplateEngine *m_engine = 0;
1983 QCString m_templateName;
1984 TemplateTokenStream &m_tokens;
1985};
1986
1987//--------------------------------------------------------------------
1988
1989/** @brief Recursive decent parser for Django style template expressions.
1990 */
1991class ExpressionParser
1992{
1993 public:
1994 ExpressionParser(const TemplateParser *parser,int line)
1995 : m_parser(parser), m_line(line), m_tokenStream(0)
1996 {
1997 }
1998 virtual ~ExpressionParser()
1999 {
2000 }
2001
2002 ExprAstPtr parse(const QCString &expr)
2003 {
2004 if (expr.isEmpty()) return 0;
2005 m_tokenStream = expr.data();
2006 getNextToken();
2007 return parseExpression();
2008 }
2009
2010 private:
2011
2012 /** @brief Class representing a token within an expression. */
2013 class ExprToken
2014 {
2015 public:
2016 ExprToken() : type(Unknown), num(-1), op(Operator::Or)
2017 {
2018 }
2019 enum Type
2020 {
2021 Unknown, Operator, Number, Identifier, Literal
2022 };
2023
2024 Type type;
2025 int num;
2026 QCString id;
2027 Operator::Type op;
2028 };
2029
2030 ExprAstPtr parseExpression()
2031 {
2032 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",Trace::trunc(m_tokenStream));
2033 ExprAstPtr result { parseOrExpression() };
2034 return result;
2035 }
2036
2037 ExprAstPtr parseOrExpression()
2038 {
2039 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2040 ExprAstPtr lhs { parseAndExpression() };
2041 if (lhs)
2042 {
2043 while (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2044 m_curToken.op==Operator::Or)
2045 {
2046 getNextToken();
2047 ExprAstPtr rhs { parseAndExpression() };
2048 lhs = std::make_unique<ExprAstBinary>(Operator::Or,std::move(lhs),std::move(rhs));
2049 }
2050 }
2051 return lhs;
2052 }
2053
2054 ExprAstPtr parseAndExpression()
2055 {
2056 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2057 ExprAstPtr lhs { parseNotExpression() };
2058 if (lhs)
2059 {
2060 while (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2061 m_curToken.op==Operator::And)
2062 {
2063 getNextToken();
2064 ExprAstPtr rhs { parseNotExpression() };
2065 lhs = std::make_unique<ExprAstBinary>(Operator::And,std::move(lhs),std::move(rhs));
2066 }
2067 }
2068 return lhs;
2069 }
2070
2071 ExprAstPtr parseNotExpression()
2072 {
2073 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2074 ExprAstPtr result;
2075 if (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2076 m_curToken.op==Operator::Not)
2077 {
2078 getNextToken();
2079 ExprAstPtr expr = parseCompareExpression();
2080 if (expr==0)
2081 {
2082 warn(m_parser->templateName(),m_line,"argument missing for not operator");
2083 return 0;
2084 }
2085 result = std::make_unique<ExprAstNegate>(std::move(expr));
2086 }
2087 else
2088 {
2089 result = parseCompareExpression();
2090 }
2091 return result;
2092 }
2093
2094 ExprAstPtr parseCompareExpression()
2095 {
2096 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2097 ExprAstPtr lhs { parseAdditiveExpression() };
2098 if (lhs)
2099 {
2100 Operator::Type op = m_curToken.op;
2101 if (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2102 (op==Operator::Less ||
2103 op==Operator::Greater ||
2104 op==Operator::Equal ||
2105 op==Operator::NotEqual ||
2106 op==Operator::LessEqual ||
2107 op==Operator::GreaterEqual
2108 )
2109 )
2110 {
2111 getNextToken();
2112 ExprAstPtr rhs { parseNotExpression() };
2113 lhs = std::make_unique<ExprAstBinary>(op,std::move(lhs),std::move(rhs));
2114 }
2115 }
2116 return lhs;
2117 }
2118
2119 ExprAstPtr parseAdditiveExpression()
2120 {
2121 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2122 ExprAstPtr lhs { parseMultiplicativeExpression() };
2123 if (lhs)
2124 {
2125 while (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2126 (m_curToken.op==Operator::Plus || m_curToken.op==Operator::Minus))
2127 {
2128 Operator::Type op = m_curToken.op;
2129 getNextToken();
2130 ExprAstPtr rhs { parseMultiplicativeExpression() };
2131 lhs = std::make_unique<ExprAstBinary>(op,std::move(lhs),std::move(rhs));
2132 }
2133 }
2134 return lhs;
2135 }
2136
2137 ExprAstPtr parseMultiplicativeExpression()
2138 {
2139 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2140 ExprAstPtr lhs = parseUnaryExpression();
2141 if (lhs)
2142 {
2143 while (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2144 (m_curToken.op==Operator::Multiply || m_curToken.op==Operator::Divide || m_curToken.op==Operator::Modulo))
2145 {
2146 Operator::Type op = m_curToken.op;
2147 getNextToken();
2148 ExprAstPtr rhs = parseUnaryExpression();
2149 lhs = std::make_unique<ExprAstBinary>(op,std::move(lhs),std::move(rhs));
2150 }
2151 }
2152 return lhs;
2153 }
2154
2155 ExprAstPtr parseUnaryExpression()
2156 {
2157 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2158 ExprAstPtr result;
2159 if (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator)
2160 {
2161 if (m_curToken.op==Operator::Plus)
2162 {
2163 getNextToken();
2164 result = parsePrimaryExpression();
2165 }
2166 else if (m_curToken.op==Operator::Minus)
2167 {
2168 getNextToken();
2169 ExprAstPtr rhs { parsePrimaryExpression() };
2170 result = std::make_unique<ExprAstUnary>(m_curToken.op,std::move(rhs));
2171 }
2172 else
2173 {
2174 result = parsePrimaryExpression();
2175 }
2176 }
2177 else
2178 {
2179 result = parsePrimaryExpression();
2180 }
2181 return result;
2182 }
2183
2184 ExprAstPtr parsePrimaryExpression()
2185 {
2186 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",m_tokenStream);
2187 ExprAstPtr result;
2188 switch (m_curToken.type)
2189 {
2190 case ExprToken::Number:
2191 result = parseNumber();
2192 break;
2193 case ExprToken::Identifier:
2194 result = parseFilteredVariable();
2195 break;
2196 case ExprToken::Literal:
2197 result = parseLiteral();
2198 break;
2199 case ExprToken::Operator:
2200 if (m_curToken.op==Operator::LeftParen)
2201 {
2202 getNextToken(); // skip over opening bracket
2203 result = parseExpression();
2204 if (m_curToken.type!=ExprToken::Operator ||
2205 m_curToken.op!=Operator::RightParen)
2206 {
2207 warn(m_parser->templateName(),m_line,"missing closing parenthesis");
2208 }
2209 else
2210 {
2211 getNextToken(); // skip over closing bracket
2212 }
2213 }
2214 else
2215 {
2216 warn(m_parser->templateName(),m_line,"unexpected operator '%s' in expression",
2217 Operator::toString(m_curToken.op));
2218 abort();
2219 }
2220 break;
2221 default:
2222 warn(m_parser->templateName(),m_line,"unexpected token in expression");
2223 }
2224 return result;
2225 }
2226
2227 ExprAstPtr parseNumber()
2228 {
2229 AUTO_TRACE("num={}",m_curToken.num);
2230 ExprAstPtr num = std::make_unique<ExprAstNumber>(m_curToken.num);
2231 getNextToken();
2232 return num;
2233 }
2234
2235 ExprAstPtr parseIdentifier()
2236 {
2237 AUTO_TRACE("id={}",m_curToken.id);
2238 ExprAstPtr id = std::make_unique<ExprAstVariable>(m_curToken.id);
2239 getNextToken();
2240 TRACE(("}parseIdentifier()\n"));
2241 return id;
2242 }
2243
2244 ExprAstPtr parseLiteral()
2245 {
2246 AUTO_TRACE("id={}",m_curToken.id);
2247 ExprAstPtr expr = std::make_unique<ExprAstLiteral>(m_curToken.id);
2248 getNextToken();
2249 TRACE(("}parseLiteral()\n"));
2250 return expr;
2251 }
2252
2253 ExprAstPtr parseIdentifierOptionalArgs()
2254 {
2255 AUTO_TRACE("id={}",m_curToken.id);
2256 ExprAstPtr expr { parseIdentifier() };
2257 if (expr)
2258 {
2259 if (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2260 m_curToken.op==Operator::Colon)
2261 {
2262 getNextToken();
2263 ExprAstList args;
2264 args.push_back(std::unique_ptr<ExprAst>(parsePrimaryExpression()));
2265 while (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2266 m_curToken.op==Operator::Comma)
2267 {
2268 getNextToken();
2269 args.push_back(std::unique_ptr<ExprAst>(parsePrimaryExpression()));
2270 }
2271 expr = std::make_unique<ExprAstFunctionVariable>(std::move(expr),std::move(args));
2272 }
2273 }
2274 return expr;
2275 }
2276
2277 ExprAstPtr parseFilteredVariable()
2278 {
2279 AUTO_TRACE();
2280 ExprAstPtr expr = parseIdentifierOptionalArgs();
2281 if (expr)
2282 {
2283 while (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2284 m_curToken.op==Operator::Filter)
2285 {
2286 getNextToken();
2287 ExprAstFilterPtr filter = parseFilter();
2288 if (!filter) break;
2289 expr = std::make_unique<ExprAstFilterAppl>(std::move(expr),std::move(filter));
2290 }
2291 }
2292 return expr;
2293 }
2294
2295 ExprAstFilterPtr parseFilter()
2296 {
2297 AUTO_TRACE("id={}",m_curToken.id);
2298 QCString filterName = m_curToken.id;
2299 getNextToken();
2300 ExprAstPtr argExpr;
2301 if (m_curToken.type==ExprToken::Operator &&
2302 m_curToken.op==Operator::Colon)
2303 {
2304 getNextToken();
2305 argExpr = parsePrimaryExpression();
2306 }
2307 ExprAstFilterPtr filter = std::make_unique<ExprAstFilter>(filterName,std::move(argExpr));
2308 return filter;
2309 }
2310
2311
2312 bool getNextToken()
2313 {
2314 AUTO_TRACE("tokens={}",Trace::trunc(m_tokenStream));
2315 const char *p = m_tokenStream;
2316 char s[2];
2317 s[1]=0;
2318 if (p==0 || *p=='\0') return FALSE;
2319 while (*p==' ') p++; // skip over spaces
2320 char c=*p;
2321 if (*p=='\0') // only spaces...
2322 {
2323 m_tokenStream = p;
2324 return FALSE;
2325 }
2326 const char *q = p;
2327 switch (c)
2328 {
2329 case '=':
2330 if (c=='=' && *(p+1)=='=') // equal
2331 {
2332 m_curToken.op = Operator::Equal;
2333 p+=2;
2334 }
2335 break;
2336 case '!':
2337 if (c=='!' && *(p+1)=='=') // not equal
2338 {
2339 m_curToken.op = Operator::NotEqual;
2340 p+=2;
2341 }
2342 break;
2343 case '<':
2344 if (c=='<' && *(p+1)=='=') // less or equal
2345 {
2346 m_curToken.op = Operator::LessEqual;
2347 p+=2;
2348 }
2349 else // less
2350 {
2351 m_curToken.op = Operator::Less;
2352 p++;
2353 }
2354 break;
2355 case '>':
2356 if (c=='>' && *(p+1)=='=') // greater or equal
2357 {
2358 m_curToken.op = Operator::GreaterEqual;
2359 p+=2;
2360 }
2361 else // greater
2362 {
2363 m_curToken.op = Operator::Greater;
2364 p++;
2365 }
2366 break;
2367 case '(':
2368 m_curToken.op = Operator::LeftParen;
2369 p++;
2370 break;
2371 case ')':
2372 m_curToken.op = Operator::RightParen;
2373 p++;
2374 break;
2375 case '|':
2376 m_curToken.op = Operator::Filter;
2377 p++;
2378 break;
2379 case '+':
2380 m_curToken.op = Operator::Plus;
2381 p++;
2382 break;
2383 case '-':
2384 m_curToken.op = Operator::Minus;
2385 p++;
2386 break;
2387 case '*':
2388 m_curToken.op = Operator::Multiply;
2389 p++;
2390 break;
2391 case '/':
2392 m_curToken.op = Operator::Divide;
2393 p++;
2394 break;
2395 case '%':
2396 m_curToken.op = Operator::Modulo;
2397 p++;
2398 break;
2399 case ':':
2400 m_curToken.op = Operator::Colon;
2401 p++;
2402 break;
2403 case ',':
2404 m_curToken.op = Operator::Comma;
2405 p++;
2406 break;
2407 case 'n':
2408 if (strncmp(p,"not ",4)==0)
2409 {
2410 m_curToken.op = Operator::Not;
2411 p+=4;
2412 }
2413 break;
2414 case 'a':
2415 if (strncmp(p,"and ",4)==0)
2416 {
2417 m_curToken.op = Operator::And;
2418 p+=4;
2419 }
2420 break;
2421 case 'o':
2422 if (strncmp(p,"or ",3)==0)
2423 {
2424 m_curToken.op = Operator::Or;
2425 p+=3;
2426 }
2427 break;
2428 default:
2429 break;
2430 }
2431 if (p!=q) // found an operator
2432 {
2433 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Operator;
2434 }
2435 else // no token found yet
2436 {
2437 if (c>='0' && c<='9') // number?
2438 {
2439 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Number;
2440 const char *np = p;
2441 m_curToken.num = 0;
2442 while (*np>='0' && *np<='9')
2443 {
2444 m_curToken.num*=10;
2445 m_curToken.num+=*np-'0';
2446 np++;
2447 }
2448 p=np;
2449 }
2450 else if (c=='_' || (c>='a' && c<='z') || (c>='A' && c<='Z')) // identifier?
2451 {
2452 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Identifier;
2453 s[0]=c;
2454 m_curToken.id = s;
2455 p++;
2456 while ((c=*p) &&
2457 (c=='_' || c=='.' ||
2458 (c>='a' && c<='z') ||
2459 (c>='A' && c<='Z') ||
2460 (c>='0' && c<='9'))
2461 )
2462 {
2463 s[0]=c;
2464 m_curToken.id+=s;
2465 p++;
2466 }
2467 if (m_curToken.id=="True") // treat true literal as numerical 1
2468 {
2469 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Number;
2470 m_curToken.num = 1;
2471 }
2472 else if (m_curToken.id=="False") // treat false literal as numerical 0
2473 {
2474 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Number;
2475 m_curToken.num = 0;
2476 }
2477 }
2478 else if (c=='"' || c=='\'') // string literal
2479 {
2480 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Literal;
2481 m_curToken.id.resize(0);
2482 p++;
2483 char tokenChar = c;
2484 char cp=0;
2485 while ((c=*p) && (c!=tokenChar || (c==tokenChar && cp=='\\')))
2486 {
2487 s[0]=c;
2488 if (c!='\\' || cp=='\\') // don't add escapes
2489 {
2490 m_curToken.id+=s;
2491 }
2492 cp=c;
2493 p++;
2494 }
2495 if (*p==tokenChar) p++;
2496 }
2497 }
2498 if (p==q) // still no valid token found -> error
2499 {
2500 m_curToken.type = ExprToken::Unknown;
2501 s[0]=c;
2502 s[1]=0;
2503 warn(m_parser->templateName(),m_line,"Found unknown token '%s' (%d) while parsing %s",s,c,m_tokenStream);
2504 m_curToken.id = s;
2505 p++;
2506 }
2507 AUTO_TRACE_ADD("token type={} op={} num={} id={}",
2508 static_cast<int>(m_curToken.type), Operator::toString(m_curToken.op),
2509 m_curToken.num, m_curToken.id);
2510
2511 m_tokenStream = p;
2512 return TRUE;
2513 }
2514
2515 const TemplateParser *m_parser = 0;
2516 ExprToken m_curToken;
2517 int m_line = 0;
2518 const char *m_tokenStream;
2519};
2520
2521//----------------------------------------------------------
2522
2523/** @brief Internal class representing the implementation of a template */
2524class TemplateImpl : public TemplateNode, public Template
2525{
2526 public:
2527 TemplateImpl(TemplateEngine *e,const QCString &name,const QCString &data,
2528 const QCString &extension);
2529 ~TemplateImpl();
2530 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c);
2531
2532 TemplateEngine *engine() const { return m_engine; }
2533 TemplateBlockContext *blockContext() { return &m_blockContext; }
2534
2535 private:
2536 TemplateEngine *m_engine = 0;
2537 QCString m_name;
2538 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
2539 TemplateBlockContext m_blockContext;
2540};
2541
2542//----------------------------------------------------------
2543
2544TemplateContextImpl::TemplateContextImpl(const TemplateEngine *e)
2545 : m_engine(e), m_indices(TemplateStruct::alloc())
2546{
2547 //printf("%p:TemplateContextImpl::TemplateContextImpl()\n",(void*)this);
2548 m_fromUtf8 = reinterpret_cast<void*>(-1);
2549 push();
2550 set("index",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(m_indices));
2551}
2552
2553TemplateContextImpl::~TemplateContextImpl()
2554{
2555 pop();
2556 //printf("%p:TemplateContextImpl::~TemplateContextImpl()\n",(void*)this);
2557}
2558
2559void TemplateContextImpl::setEncoding(const QCString &templateName,int line,const QCString &enc)
2560{
2561 if (enc==m_encoding) return; // nothing changed
2562 if (m_fromUtf8!=reinterpret_cast<void *>(-1))
2563 {
2564 portable_iconv_close(m_fromUtf8);
2565 m_fromUtf8 = reinterpret_cast<void*>(-1);
2566 }
2567 m_encoding=enc;
2568 if (!enc.isEmpty())
2569 {
2570 m_fromUtf8 = portable_iconv_open(enc.data(),"UTF-8");
2571 if (m_fromUtf8==reinterpret_cast<void*>(-1))
2572 {
2573 warn(templateName,line,"unsupported character conversion: '%s'->'UTF-8'", qPrint(enc));
2574 }
2575 }
2576 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::setEncoding(%s)\n",qPrint(enc));
2577}
2578
2579QCString TemplateContextImpl::recode(const QCString &s)
2580{
2581 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::recode(%s)\n",qPrint(s));
2582 size_t iSize = s.length();
2583 size_t oSize = iSize*4+1;
2584 QCString output(oSize);
2585 size_t iLeft = iSize;
2586 size_t oLeft = oSize;
2587 const char *iPtr = s.data();
2588 char *oPtr = output.rawData();
2589 if (!portable_iconv(m_fromUtf8,&iPtr,&iLeft,&oPtr,&oLeft))
2590 {
2591 oSize -= oLeft;
2592 output.resize(oSize+1);
2593 output.at(oSize)='\0';
2594 return output;
2595 }
2596 else
2597 {
2598 return s;
2599 }
2600}
2601
2602void TemplateContextImpl::set(const QCString &name,const TemplateVariant &v)
2603{
2604 auto &ctx = m_contextStack.front();
2605 auto it = ctx.find(name.str());
2606 if (it!=ctx.end())
2607 {
2608 ctx.erase(it);
2609 }
2610 ctx.insert(std::make_pair(name.str(),v));
2611 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::set(%s) #stacks=%lu front().size()=%lu\n",
2612 // qPrint(name),m_contextStack.size(),m_contextStack.size()>0 ? m_contextStack.front().size() : 0);
2613}
2614
2615
2616TemplateVariant TemplateContextImpl::get(const QCString &name) const
2617{
2618 int i=name.find('.');
2619 if (i==-1) // simple name
2620 {
2621 return getPrimary(name);
2622 }
2623 else // obj.prop
2624 {
2625 QCString objName = name.left(i);
2626 TemplateVariant v = getPrimary(objName);
2627 QCString propName = name.mid(i+1);
2628 while (!propName.isEmpty())
2629 {
2630 //printf("getPrimary(%s) type=%zu:%s\n",qPrint(objName),v.type(),qPrint(v.toString()));
2631 if (v.isStruct() || v.isWeakStruct())
2632 {
2633 TemplateStructIntfPtr s = v.toStruct();
2634 if (s)
2635 {
2636 i = propName.find(".");
2637 int l = i==-1 ? propName.length() : i;
2638 v = s->get(propName.left(l));
2639 if (!v.isValid())
2640 {
2641 warn(m_templateName,m_line,"requesting non-existing property '%s' for object '%s'",qPrint(propName.left(l)),qPrint(objName));
2642 }
2643 if (i!=-1)
2644 {
2645 objName = propName.left(i);
2646 propName = propName.mid(i+1);
2647 }
2648 else
2649 {
2650 propName.resize(0);
2651 }
2652 }
2653 else
2654 {
2655 return TemplateVariant();
2656 }
2657 }
2658 else if (v.isList())
2659 {
2660 TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
2661 if (list)
2662 {
2663 i = propName.find(".");
2664 int l = i==-1 ? propName.length() : i;
2665 bool b;
2666 int index = propName.left(l).toInt(&b);
2667 if (b)
2668 {
2669 v = list->at(index);
2670 }
2671 else
2672 {
2673 warn(m_templateName,m_line,"list index '%s' is not valid",qPrint(propName));
2674 break;
2675 }
2676 if (i!=-1)
2677 {
2678 propName = propName.mid(i+1);
2679 }
2680 else
2681 {
2682 propName.resize(0);
2683 }
2684 }
2685 else
2686 {
2687 return TemplateVariant();
2688 }
2689 }
2690 else
2691 {
2692 warn(m_templateName,m_line,"using . on an object '%s' is not an struct or list",qPrint(objName));
2693 return TemplateVariant();
2694 }
2695 }
2696 return v;
2697 }
2698}
2699
2700const TemplateVariant *TemplateContextImpl::getRef(const QCString &name) const
2701{
2702 for (const auto &ctx : m_contextStack)
2703 {
2704 auto it = ctx.find(name.str());
2705 if (it!=ctx.end())
2706 {
2707 return &it->second;
2708 }
2709 }
2710 return 0; // not found
2711}
2712
2713TemplateVariant TemplateContextImpl::getPrimary(const QCString &name) const
2714{
2715 const TemplateVariant *v = getRef(name);
2716 return v ? *v : TemplateVariant();
2717}
2718
2719void TemplateContextImpl::push()
2720{
2721 m_contextStack.push_front(std::unordered_map<std::string,TemplateVariant>());
2722 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::push() #stacks=%lu\n",m_contextStack.size());
2723}
2724
2725void TemplateContextImpl::pop()
2726{
2727 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::pop() #stacks=%lu\n",m_contextStack.size());
2728 if (m_contextStack.empty())
2729 {
2730 warn(m_templateName,m_line,"pop() called on empty context stack!");
2731 }
2732 else
2733 {
2734 m_contextStack.pop_front();
2735 }
2736}
2737
2738TemplateBlockContext *TemplateContextImpl::blockContext()
2739{
2740 return &m_blockContext;
2741}
2742
2743void TemplateContextImpl::warn(const QCString &fileName,int line,const char *fmt,...) const
2744{
2745 va_list args;
2746 va_start(args,fmt);
2747 va_warn(fileName,line,fmt,args);
2748 va_end(args);
2749 m_engine->printIncludeContext(fileName,line);
2750}
2751
2752void TemplateContextImpl::openSubIndex(const QCString &indexName)
2753{
2754 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::openSubIndex(%s)\n",qPrint(indexName));
2755 auto kv = m_indexStacks.find(indexName.str());
2756 if (kv==m_indexStacks.end() || kv->second.empty() || kv->second.top().isList()) // error: no stack yet or no entry
2757 {
2758 warn(m_templateName,m_line,"opensubindex for index %s without preceding indexentry",qPrint(indexName));
2759 return;
2760 }
2761 // get the parent entry to add the list to
2762 auto &stack = kv->second;
2763 TemplateStructPtr entry = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<TemplateStruct>(stack.top().toStruct());
2764 if (entry)
2765 {
2766 // add new list to the stack
2767 TemplateListPtr list = TemplateList::alloc();
2768 stack.emplace(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(list));
2769 entry->set("children",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(list));
2770 entry->set("is_leaf_node",false);
2771 }
2772}
2773
2774void TemplateContextImpl::closeSubIndex(const QCString &indexName)
2775{
2776 //printf("TemplateContextImpl::closeSubIndex(%s)\n",qPrint(indexName));
2777 auto kv = m_indexStacks.find(indexName.str());
2778 if (kv==m_indexStacks.end() || kv->second.size()<3)
2779 {
2780 warn(m_templateName,m_line,"closesubindex for index %s without matching open",qPrint(indexName));
2781 }
2782 else
2783 {
2784 auto &stack = kv->second; // stack.size()>2
2785 if (stack.top().isStruct() || stack.top().isWeakStruct())
2786 {
2787 stack.pop(); // pop struct
2788 stack.pop(); // pop list
2789 }
2790 else // empty list! correct "is_left_node" attribute of the parent entry
2791 {
2792 stack.pop(); // pop list
2793 TemplateStructPtr entry = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<TemplateStruct>(stack.top().toStruct());
2794 if (entry)
2795 {
2796 entry->set("is_leaf_node",true);
2797 }
2798 }
2799 }
2800 //fprintf(stderr,"TemplateContextImpl::closeSubIndex(%s) end g_count=%d\n\n",qPrint(indexName),g_count);
2801}
2802
2803static void getPathListFunc(const TemplateStructIntfPtr entry,TemplateListPtr list)
2804{
2805 if (entry)
2806 {
2807 TemplateVariant parent = entry->get("parent");
2808 if (parent.isStruct() || parent.isWeakStruct())
2809 {
2810 getPathListFunc(parent.toStruct(),list);
2811 }
2812 list->append(entry);
2813 }
2814}
2815
2816static TemplateVariant getPathFunc(const TemplateStructIntfWeakPtr entryWeakRef)
2817{
2818 TemplateListPtr result = TemplateList::alloc();
2819 getPathListFunc(entryWeakRef.lock(),result);
2820 return std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(result);
2821}
2822
2823void TemplateContextImpl::addIndexEntry(const QCString &indexName,const std::vector<TemplateKeyValue> &arguments)
2824{
2825 //auto it = arguments.begin();
2826 //printf("%p:> TemplateContextImpl::addIndexEntry(%s)\n",(void*)this,qPrint(indexName));
2827 //while (it!=arguments.end())
2828 //{
2829 // printf(" key=%s value=%s\n",(*it).key.data(),(*it).value.toString().data());
2830 // ++it;
2831 //}
2832 TemplateVariant parent(FALSE);
2833 auto kv = m_indexStacks.find(indexName.str());
2834 if (kv==m_indexStacks.end()) // no stack yet, create it!
2835 {
2836 kv = m_indexStacks.insert(std::make_pair(indexName.str(),std::stack<TemplateVariant>())).first;
2837 }
2838 TemplateListPtr list;
2839 auto &stack = kv->second;
2840 if (stack.empty()) // first item, create empty list and add it to the index
2841 {
2842 list = TemplateList::alloc();
2843 stack.emplace(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(list));
2844 m_indices->set(indexName,std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateListIntf>(list)); // make list available under index
2845 }
2846 else // stack not empty
2847 {
2848 if (stack.top().isStruct() || stack.top().isWeakStruct()) // already an entry in the list
2849 {
2850 // remove current entry from the stack
2851 stack.pop();
2852 }
2853 else // first entry after opensubindex
2854 {
2855 ASSERT(stack.top().isList());
2856 }
2857 if (stack.size()>1)
2858 {
2859 TemplateVariant tmp = stack.top();
2860 stack.pop();
2861 // To prevent a cyclic dependency between parent and child which causes a memory
2862 // leak, we wrap the parent into a weak reference version.
2863 //parent = TemplateVariant(TemplateStructIntfWeakPtr(stack.top().toStruct()));
2864 stack.push(tmp);
2865 }
2866 // get list to add new item
2867 list = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<TemplateList>(stack.top().toList());
2868 }
2869 TemplateStructPtr entry = TemplateStruct::alloc();
2870 // add user specified fields to the entry
2871 for (auto it=arguments.begin();it!=arguments.end();++it)
2872 {
2873 entry->set((*it).key,(*it).value);
2874 }
2875 if (list->count()>0)
2876 {
2877 TemplateStructPtr lastEntry = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<TemplateStruct>(list->at(list->count()-1).toStruct());
2878 if (lastEntry)
2879 {
2880 lastEntry->set("last",false);
2881 }
2882 }
2883 entry->set("is_leaf_node",true);
2884 entry->set("first",list->count()==0);
2885 entry->set("index",list->count());
2886 entry->set("parent",parent);
2887 TemplateStructIntfWeakPtr entryWeak(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(entry));
2888 entry->set("path",TemplateVariant([entryWeak](const TemplateVariantList &){ return getPathFunc(entryWeak); }));
2889 entry->set("last",true);
2890 stack.push(TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(entry)));
