2891 list->append(TemplateVariant(std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(entry)));
2892}
2893
2894//----------------------------------------------------------
2895
2896/** @brief Class representing a piece of plain text in a template */
2897class TemplateNodeText : public TemplateNode
2898{
2899 public:
2900 TemplateNodeText(TemplateParser *,TemplateNode *parent,int,const QCString &data)
2901 : TemplateNode(parent), m_data(data)
2902 {
2903 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
2904 }
2905
2906 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
2907 {
2908 AUTO_TRACE();
2909 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
2910 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
2911 //printf("TemplateNodeText::render(%s) needsRecoding=%d ci=%p\n",qPrint(m_data),ci->needsRecoding(),ci);
2912 if (ci->spacelessEnabled())
2913 {
2914 if (ci->needsRecoding())
2915 {
2916 ts << ci->recode(ci->spacelessIntf()->remove(m_data));
2917 }
2918 else
2919 {
2920 ts << ci->spacelessIntf()->remove(m_data);
2921 }
2922 }
2923 else
2924 {
2925 if (ci->needsRecoding())
2926 {
2927 ts << ci->recode(m_data);
2928 }
2929 else
2930 {
2931 ts << m_data;
2932 }
2933 }
2934 }
2935 private:
2936 QCString m_data;
2937};
2938
2939//----------------------------------------------------------
2940
2941/** @brief Class representing a variable in a template */
2942class TemplateNodeVariable : public TemplateNode
2943{
2944 public:
2945 TemplateNodeVariable(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &var)
2946 : TemplateNode(parent), m_templateName(parser->templateName()), m_line(line)
2947 {
2948 AUTO_TRACE("var={}",var);
2949 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
2950 m_var = expParser.parse(var);
2951 if (m_var==0)
2952 {
2953 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"invalid expression '%s' for variable",qPrint(var));
2954 }
2955 }
2956 ~TemplateNodeVariable()
2957 {
2958 }
2959
2960 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
2961 {
2962 AUTO_TRACE();
2963 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
2964 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
2965 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
2966 if (m_var)
2967 {
2968 TemplateVariant v = m_var->resolve(c);
2969 if (v.isFunction())
2970 {
2971 v = v.call();
2972 }
2973 if (ci->escapeIntf() && !v.raw())
2974 {
2975 if (ci->needsRecoding())
2976 {
2977 ts << ci->recode(ci->escapeIntf()->escape(v.toString()));
2978 }
2979 else
2980 {
2981 ts << ci->escapeIntf()->escape(v.toString());
2982 }
2983 }
2984 else
2985 {
2986 if (ci->needsRecoding())
2987 {
2988 ts << ci->recode(v.toString());
2989 }
2990 else
2991 {
2992 ts << v.toString();
2993 }
2994 }
2995 }
2996 }
2997
2998 private:
2999 QCString m_templateName;
3000 int m_line = 0;
3001 ExprAstPtr m_var;
3002};
3003
3004//----------------------------------------------------------
3005
3006/** @brief Helper class for creating template AST tag nodes and returning
3007 * the template for a given node.
3008 */
3009template<class T> class TemplateNodeCreator : public TemplateNode
3010{
3011 public:
3012 TemplateNodeCreator(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line)
3013 : TemplateNode(parent), m_templateName(parser->templateName()), m_line(line) {}
3014 static TemplateNodePtr createInstance(TemplateParser *parser,
3015 TemplateNode *parent,
3016 int line,
3017 const QCString &data)
3018 {
3019 return std::make_unique<T>(parser,parent,line,data);
3020 }
3021 TemplateImpl *getTemplate()
3022 {
3023 TemplateNode *root = this;
3024 while (root && root->parent())
3025 {
3026 root = root->parent();
3027 }
3028 return dynamic_cast<TemplateImpl*>(root);
3029 }
3030 protected:
3031 void mkpath(const TemplateContextImpl *ci,const std::string &fileName)
3032 {
3033 size_t i=fileName.find('/');
3034 std::string outputDir = ci->outputDirectory().str();
3035 Dir d(outputDir);
3036 if (!d.exists())
3037 {
3038 Dir rootDir;
3039 if (!rootDir.mkdir(outputDir))
3040 {
3041 err("tag OUTPUT_DIRECTORY: Output directory '%s' does not "
3042 "exist and cannot be created\n",outputDir.c_str());
3043 return;
3044 }
3045 d.setPath(outputDir);
3046 }
3047 size_t j=0;
3048 while (i!=std::string::npos) // fileName contains path part
3049 {
3050 if (d.exists())
3051 {
3052 bool ok = d.mkdir(fileName.substr(j,i-j));
3053 if (!ok)
3054 {
3055 err("Failed to create directory '%s'\n",(fileName.substr(j,i-j)).c_str());
3056 break;
3057 }
3058 std::string dirName = outputDir+'/'+fileName.substr(0,i);
3059 d = Dir(dirName);
3060 j = i+1;
3061 }
3062 i=fileName.find('/',i+1);
3063 }
3064 }
3065 QCString m_templateName;
3066 int m_line = 0;
3067};
3068
3069//----------------------------------------------------------
3070
3071/** @brief Class representing an 'if' tag in a template */
3072class TemplateNodeIf : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeIf>
3073{
3074 public:
3075 TemplateNodeIf(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data) :
3076 TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeIf>(parser,parent,line)
3077 {
3078 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3079 if (data.isEmpty())
3080 {
3081 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"missing argument for if tag");
3082 }
3083 StringVector stopAt = { "endif", "elif", "else" };
3084
3085 // if 'nodes'
3086 {
3087 m_ifGuardedNodes.push_back(std::make_unique<GuardedNodes>());
3088 auto &guardedNodes = m_ifGuardedNodes.back();
3089 ExpressionParser ex(parser,line);
3090 guardedNodes->line = line;
3091 guardedNodes->guardAst = ex.parse(data);
3092 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,guardedNodes->trueNodes);
3093 }
3094 auto tok = parser->takeNextToken();
3095
3096 // elif 'nodes'
3097 while (tok && tok->data.startsWith("elif "))
3098 {
3099 m_ifGuardedNodes.push_back(std::make_unique<GuardedNodes>());
3100 auto &guardedNodes = m_ifGuardedNodes.back();
3101 ExpressionParser ex(parser,line);
3102 guardedNodes->line = tok->line;
3103 guardedNodes->guardAst = ex.parse(tok->data.mid(5));
3104 parser->parse(this,tok->line,stopAt,guardedNodes->trueNodes);
3105 // proceed to the next token
3106 tok = parser->takeNextToken();
3107 }
3108
3109 // else 'nodes'
3110 if (tok && tok->data=="else")
3111 {
3112 stopAt.pop_back(); // remove "else"
3113 stopAt.pop_back(); // remove "elif"
3114 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_falseNodes);
3115 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endif
3116 }
3117 }
3118 ~TemplateNodeIf()
3119 {
3120 }
3121
3122 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3123 {
3124 AUTO_TRACE();
3125 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3126 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3127 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3128 //printf("TemplateNodeIf::render #trueNodes=%d #falseNodes=%d\n",m_trueNodes.count(),m_falseNodes.count());
3129 bool processed=FALSE;
3130 for (auto &nodes : m_ifGuardedNodes)
3131 {
3132 if (nodes->guardAst)
3133 {
3134 TemplateVariant guardValue = nodes->guardAst->resolve(c);
3135 if (guardValue.toBool()) // render nodes for the first guard that evaluated to 'true'
3136 {
3137 nodes->trueNodes.render(ts,c);
3138 processed=TRUE;
3139 break;
3140 }
3141 }
3142 else
3143 {
3144 ci->warn(m_templateName,nodes->line,"invalid expression for if/elif");
3145 }
3146 }
3147 if (!processed)
3148 {
3149 // all guards are false, render 'else' nodes
3150 m_falseNodes.render(ts,c);
3151 }
3152 }
3153 private:
3154 struct GuardedNodes
3155 {
3156 int line = 0;
3157 ExprAstPtr guardAst;
3158 TemplateNodeList trueNodes;
3159 };
3160 std::vector< std::unique_ptr<GuardedNodes> > m_ifGuardedNodes;
3161 TemplateNodeList m_falseNodes;
3162};
3163
3164//----------------------------------------------------------
3165/** @brief Class representing a 'for' tag in a template */
3166class TemplateNodeRepeat : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeRepeat>
3167{
3168 public:
3169 TemplateNodeRepeat(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3170 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeRepeat>(parser,parent,line)
3171 {
3172 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3173 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
3174 m_expr = expParser.parse(data);
3175 StringVector stopAt = { "endrepeat" };
3176 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_repeatNodes);
3177 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endrepeat
3178 }
3179 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3180 {
3181 AUTO_TRACE();
3182 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3183 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3184 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3185 TemplateVariant v;
3186 if (m_expr && (v=m_expr->resolve(c)).isInt())
3187 {
3188 int i, n = v.toInt();
3189 for (i=0;i<n;i++)
3190 {
3191 TemplateStructPtr s = TemplateStruct::alloc();
3192 s->set("counter0", i);
3193 s->set("counter", i+1);
3194 s->set("revcounter", n-i);
3195 s->set("revcounter0", n-i-1);
3196 s->set("first",i==0);
3197 s->set("last", i==n-1);
3198 c->set("repeatloop",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(s));
3199 // render all items for this iteration of the loop
3200 m_repeatNodes.render(ts,c);
3201 }
3202 }
3203 else // simple type...
3204 {
3205 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"for requires a variable of list type!");
3206 }
3207 }
3208 private:
3209 TemplateNodeList m_repeatNodes;
3210 ExprAstPtr m_expr;
3211};
3212
3213//----------------------------------------------------------
3214
3215/** @brief Class representing a 'range' tag in a template */
3216class TemplateNodeRange : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeRange>
3217{
3218 public:
3219 TemplateNodeRange(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3220 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeRange>(parser,parent,line), m_down(FALSE)
3221 {
3222 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3223 QCString start,end;
3224 int i1 = data.find(" from ");
3225 int i2 = data.find(" to ");
3226 int i3 = data.find(" downto ");
3227 if (i1==-1)
3228 {
3229 if (data.endsWith(" from"))
3230 {
3231 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range missing after 'from' keyword");
3232 }
3233 else if (data=="from")
3234 {
3235 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range needs an iterator variable and a range");
3236 }
3237 else
3238 {
3239 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range is missing 'from' keyword");
3240 }
3241 }
3242 else if (i2==-1 && i3==-1)
3243 {
3244 if (data.endsWith(" to"))
3245 {
3246 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range is missing end value after 'to' keyword");
3247 }
3248 else if (data.endsWith(" downto"))
3249 {
3250 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range is missing end value after 'downto' keyword");
3251 }
3252 else
3253 {
3254 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range is missing 'to' or 'downto' keyword");
3255 }
3256 }
3257 else
3258 {
3259 m_var = data.left(i1).stripWhiteSpace();
3260 if (m_var.isEmpty())
3261 {
3262 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"range needs an iterator variable");
3263 }
3264 start = data.mid(i1+6,i2-i1-6).stripWhiteSpace();
3265 if (i2!=-1)
3266 {
3267 end = data.right(data.length()-i2-4).stripWhiteSpace();
3268 m_down = FALSE;
3269 }
3270 else if (i3!=-1)
3271 {
3272 end = data.right(data.length()-i3-8).stripWhiteSpace();
3273 m_down = TRUE;
3274 }
3275 }
3276 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
3277 m_startExpr = expParser.parse(start);
3278 m_endExpr = expParser.parse(end);
3279
3280 StringVector stopAt = { "endrange" };
3281 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_loopNodes);
3282 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endrange
3283 }
3284
3285 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3286 {
3287 AUTO_TRACE();
3288 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3289 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3290 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3291 //printf("TemplateNodeRange::render #loopNodes=%d\n",
3292 // m_loopNodes.count());
3293 if (m_startExpr && m_endExpr)
3294 {
3295 TemplateVariant vs = m_startExpr->resolve(c);
3296 TemplateVariant ve = m_endExpr->resolve(c);
3297 if (vs.isInt() && ve.isInt())
3298 {
3299 size_t s = vs.toInt();
3300 size_t e = ve.toInt();
3301 size_t l = m_down ? s-e+1 : e-s+1;
3302 if (l>0)
3303 {
3304 c->push();
3305 //int index = m_reversed ? list.count() : 0;
3306 const TemplateVariant *parentLoop = c->getRef("forloop");
3307 size_t index = 0;
3308 size_t i = m_down ? e : s;
3309 bool done=false;
3310 while (!done)
3311 {
3312 // set the forloop meta-data variable
3313 TemplateStructPtr ls = TemplateStruct::alloc();
3314 ls->set("counter0", index);
3315 ls->set("counter", (index+1));
3316 ls->set("revcounter", (l-index));
3317 ls->set("revcounter0", (l-index-1));
3318 ls->set("first", index==0);
3319 ls->set("last", index==l-1);
3320 ls->set("parentloop",parentLoop ? *parentLoop : TemplateVariant());
3321 c->set("forloop",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(ls));
3322
3323 // set the iterator variable
3324 c->set(m_var,i);
3325
3326 // render all items for this iteration of the loop
3327 m_loopNodes.render(ts,c);
3328
3329 index++;
3330 if (m_down)
3331 {
3332 i--;
3333 done = i<e;
3334 }
3335 else
3336 {
3337 i++;
3338 done = i>e;
3339 }
3340 }
3341 c->pop();
3342 }
3343 else
3344 {
3345 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"range %d %s %d is empty!",
3346 s,m_down?"downto":"to",e);
3347 }
3348 }
3349 else if (!vs.isInt())
3350 {
3351 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"range requires a start value of integer type!");
3352 }
3353 else if (!ve.isInt())
3354 {
3355 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"range requires an end value of integer type!");
3356 }
3357 }
3358 else if (!m_startExpr)
3359 {
3360 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"range has empty start value");
3361 }
3362 else if (!m_endExpr)
3363 {
3364 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"range has empty end value");
3365 }
3366 }
3367
3368 private:
3369 bool m_down = false;
3370 ExprAstPtr m_startExpr;
3371 ExprAstPtr m_endExpr;
3372 QCString m_var;
3373 TemplateNodeList m_loopNodes;
3374};
3375
3376//----------------------------------------------------------
3377
3378/** @brief Class representing a 'for' tag in a template */
3379class TemplateNodeFor : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeFor>
3380{
3381 public:
3382 TemplateNodeFor(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3383 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeFor>(parser,parent,line), m_reversed(FALSE)
3384 {
3385 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3386 QCString exprStr;
3387 int i = data.find(" in ");
3388 if (i==-1)
3389 {
3390 if (data.endsWith(" in"))
3391 {
3392 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"for is missing container after 'in' keyword");
3393 }
3394 else if (data=="in")
3395 {
3396 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"for needs at least one iterator variable");
3397 }
3398 else
3399 {
3400 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"for is missing 'in' keyword");
3401 }
3402 }
3403 else
3404 {
3405 m_vars = split(data.left(i),",");
3406 if (m_vars.size()==0)
3407 {
3408 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"for needs at least one iterator variable");
3409 }
3410
3411 int j = data.find(" reversed",i);
3412 m_reversed = (j!=-1);
3413
3414 if (j==-1) j=data.length();
3415 if (j>i+4)
3416 {
3417 exprStr = data.mid(i+4,j-i-4); // skip over " in " part
3418 }
3419 if (exprStr.isEmpty())
3420 {
3421 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"for is missing container after 'in' keyword");
3422 }
3423 }
3424 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
3425 m_expr = expParser.parse(exprStr);
3426
3427 StringVector stopAt = { "endfor", "empty" };
3428 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_loopNodes);
3429 auto tok = parser->takeNextToken();
3430 if (tok && tok->data=="empty")
3431 {
3432 stopAt.pop_back();
3433 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_emptyNodes);
3434 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endfor
3435 }
3436 }
3437
3438 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3439 {
3440 AUTO_TRACE();
3441 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3442 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3443 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3444 //printf("TemplateNodeFor::render #loopNodes=%d #emptyNodes=%d\n",
3445 // m_loopNodes.count(),m_emptyNodes.count());
3446 if (m_expr)
3447 {
3448 TemplateVariant v = m_expr->resolve(c);
3449 if (v.isFunction())
3450 {
3451 v = v.call();
3452 }
3453 const TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
3454 if (list)
3455 {
3456 size_t listSize = list->count();
3457 if (listSize==0) // empty for loop
3458 {
3459 m_emptyNodes.render(ts,c);
3460 return;
3461 }
3462 c->push();
3463 //int index = m_reversed ? list.count() : 0;
3464 //TemplateVariant v;
3465 const TemplateVariant *parentLoop = c->getRef("forloop");
3466 size_t index = m_reversed ? listSize-1 : 0;
3467 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
3468 TemplateVariant ve;
3469 for (m_reversed ? it->toLast() : it->toFirst();
3470 (it->current(ve));
3471 m_reversed ? it->toPrev() : it->toNext())
3472 {
3473 TemplateStructPtr s = TemplateStruct::alloc();
3474 s->set("counter0", index);
3475 s->set("counter", index+1);
3476 s->set("revcounter", listSize-index);
3477 s->set("revcounter0", listSize-index-1);
3478 s->set("first", index==0);
3479 s->set("last", index==listSize-1);
3480 s->set("parentloop",parentLoop ? *parentLoop : TemplateVariant());
3481 c->set("forloop",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(s));
3482
3483 // add variables for this loop to the context
3484 //obj->addVariableToContext(index,m_vars,c);
3485 uint32_t vi=0;
3486 if (m_vars.size()==1) // loop variable represents an item
3487 {
3488 c->set(m_vars[vi++],ve);
3489 }
3490 else if (m_vars.size()>1 && (ve.isStruct() || ve.isWeakStruct()))
3491 // loop variables represent elements in a list item
3492 {
3493 TemplateStructIntfPtr vs = ve.toStruct();
3494 if (vs)
3495 {
3496 for (uint32_t i=0;i<m_vars.size();i++,vi++)
3497 {
3498 c->set(m_vars[vi],vs->get(m_vars[vi]));
3499 }
3500 }
3501 }
3502 for (;vi<m_vars.size();vi++)
3503 {
3504 c->set(m_vars[vi],TemplateVariant());
3505 }
3506
3507 // render all items for this iteration of the loop
3508 m_loopNodes.render(ts,c);
3509
3510 if (m_reversed) index--; else index++;
3511 }
3512 c->pop();
3513 }
3514 else // simple type...
3515 {
3516 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"for requires a variable of list type, got type '%s'!",qPrint(v.typeAsString()));
3517 }
3518 }
3519 }
3520
3521 private:
3522 bool m_reversed = false;
3523 ExprAstPtr m_expr;
3524 std::vector<QCString> m_vars;
3525 TemplateNodeList m_loopNodes;
3526 TemplateNodeList m_emptyNodes;
3527};
3528
3529//----------------------------------------------------------
3530
3531/** @brief Class representing an 'markers' tag in a template */
3532class TemplateNodeMsg : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeMsg>
3533{
3534 public:
3535 TemplateNodeMsg(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &)
3536 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeMsg>(parser,parent,line)
3537 {
3538 AUTO_TRACE();
3539 StringVector stopAt = { "endmsg" };
3540 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
3541 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endmsg
3542 }
3543 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
3544 {
3545 AUTO_TRACE();
3546 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3547 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3548 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3549 TemplateEscapeIntf *escIntf = ci->escapeIntf();
3550 ci->setActiveEscapeIntf(0); // avoid escaping things we send to standard out
3551 bool enable = ci->spacelessEnabled();
3552 ci->enableSpaceless(FALSE);
3553 TextStream t(&std::cout);
3554 m_nodes.render(t,c);
3555 t.flush();
3556 std::cout << "\n";
3557 ci->setActiveEscapeIntf(escIntf);
3558 ci->enableSpaceless(enable);
3559 }
3560 private:
3561 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
3562};
3563
3564
3565//----------------------------------------------------------
3566
3567/** @brief Class representing a 'block' tag in a template */
3568class TemplateNodeBlock : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeBlock>
3569{
3570 public:
3571 TemplateNodeBlock(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3572 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeBlock>(parser,parent,line)
3573 {
3574 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3575 m_blockName = data;
3576 if (m_blockName.isEmpty())
3577 {
3578 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"block tag without name");
3579 }
3580 StringVector stopAt = { "endblock" };
3581 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
3582 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endblock
3583 }
3584
3585 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3586 {
3587 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3588 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3589 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3590 TemplateImpl *t = getTemplate();
3591 if (t)
3592 {
3593 // remove block from the context, so block.super can work
3594 TemplateNodeBlock *nb = ci->blockContext()->pop(m_blockName);
3595 if (nb) // block is overruled
3596 {
3597 ci->push();
3598 TextStream ss;
3599 // get super block of block nb
3600 TemplateNodeBlock *sb = ci->blockContext()->get(m_blockName);
3601 if (sb && sb!=nb && sb!=this) // nb and sb both overrule this block
3602 {
3603 sb->render(ss,c); // render parent of nb to string
3604 }
3605 else if (nb!=this) // only nb overrules this block
3606 {
3607 m_nodes.render(ss,c); // render parent of nb to string
3608 }
3609 QCString super = ss.str();
3610 // add 'block.super' variable to allow access to parent block content
3611 TemplateStructPtr superBlock = TemplateStruct::alloc();
3612 superBlock->set("super",TemplateVariant(super.data(),TRUE));
3613 ci->set("block",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(superBlock));
3614 // render the overruled block contents
3615 t->engine()->enterBlock(nb->m_templateName,nb->m_blockName,nb->m_line);
3616 nb->m_nodes.render(ts,c);
3617 t->engine()->leaveBlock();
3618 ci->pop();
3619 // re-add block to the context
3620 ci->blockContext()->push(nb);
3621 }
3622 else // block has no overrule
3623 {
3624 t->engine()->enterBlock(m_templateName,m_blockName,m_line);
3625 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
3626 t->engine()->leaveBlock();
3627 }
3628 }
3629 }
3630
3631 QCString name() const
3632 {
3633 return m_blockName;
3634 }
3635
3636 private:
3637 QCString m_blockName;
3638 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
3639};
3640
3641//----------------------------------------------------------
3642
3643/** @brief Class representing a 'extend' tag in a template */
3644class TemplateNodeExtend : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeExtend>
3645{
3646 public:
3647 TemplateNodeExtend(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3648 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeExtend>(parser,parent,line)
3649 {
3650 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3651 ExpressionParser ep(parser,line);
3652 if (data.isEmpty())
3653 {
3654 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"extend tag is missing template file argument");
3655 }
3656 m_extendExpr = ep.parse(data);
3657 StringVector stopAt;
3658 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
3659 }
3660
3661 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3662 {
3663 AUTO_TRACE();
3664 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3665 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3666 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3667 if (m_extendExpr==0) return;
3668
3669 QCString extendFile = m_extendExpr->resolve(c).toString();
3670 if (extendFile.isEmpty())
3671 {
3672 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"invalid parameter for extend command");
3673 }
3674
3675 // goto root of tree (template node)
3676 TemplateImpl *t = getTemplate();
3677 if (t)
3678 {
3679 Template *bt = t->engine()->loadByName(extendFile,m_line);
3680 TemplateImpl *baseTemplate = bt ? dynamic_cast<TemplateImpl*>(bt) : 0;
3681 if (baseTemplate)
3682 {
3683 // fill block context
3684 TemplateBlockContext *bc = ci->blockContext();
3685
3686 // add overruling blocks to the context
3687 for (const auto &n : m_nodes)
3688 {
3689 TemplateNodeBlock *nb = dynamic_cast<TemplateNodeBlock*>(n.get());
3690 if (nb)
3691 {
3692 bc->add(nb);
3693 }
3694 TemplateNodeMsg *msg = dynamic_cast<TemplateNodeMsg*>(n.get());
3695 if (msg)
3696 {
3697 msg->render(ts,c);
3698 }
3699 }
3700
3701 // render the base template with the given context
3702 baseTemplate->render(ts,c);
3703
3704 // clean up
3705 bc->clear();
3706 }
3707 else
3708 {
3709 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"failed to load template %s for extend",qPrint(extendFile));
3710 }
3711 t->engine()->unload(bt);
3712 }
3713 }
3714
3715 private:
3716 ExprAstPtr m_extendExpr;
3717 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
3718};
3719
3720/** @brief Class representing an 'include' tag in a template */
3721class TemplateNodeInclude : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeInclude>
3722{
3723 public:
3724 TemplateNodeInclude(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3725 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeInclude>(parser,parent,line)
3726 {
3727 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3728 ExpressionParser ep(parser,line);
3729 if (data.isEmpty())
3730 {
3731 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"include tag is missing template file argument");
3732 }
3733 m_includeExpr = ep.parse(data);
3734 }
3735 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3736 {
3737 AUTO_TRACE();
3738 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3739 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3740 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3741 if (m_includeExpr)
3742 {
3743 QCString includeFile = m_includeExpr->resolve(c).toString();
3744 if (includeFile.isEmpty())
3745 {
3746 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"invalid parameter for include command");
3747 }
3748 else
3749 {
3750 TemplateImpl *t = getTemplate();
3751 if (t)
3752 {
3753 Template *it = t->engine()->loadByName(includeFile,m_line);
3754 TemplateImpl *incTemplate = it ? dynamic_cast<TemplateImpl*>(it) : 0;
3755 if (incTemplate)
3756 {
3757 incTemplate->render(ts,c);
3758 }
3759 else
3760 {
3761 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"failed to load template '%s' for include",qPrint(includeFile));
3762 }
3763 t->engine()->unload(it);
3764 }
3765 }
3766 }
3767 }
3768
3769 private:
3770 ExprAstPtr m_includeExpr;
3771};
3772
3773//----------------------------------------------------------
3774
3775static void stripLeadingWhiteSpace(QCString &s)
3776{
3777 bool skipSpaces=true;
3778 const char *src = s.data();
3779 char *dst = s.rawData();
3780 char c;
3781 while ((c=*src++))
3782 {
3783 if (c=='\n') { *dst++=c; skipSpaces=true; }
3784 else if (c==' ' && skipSpaces) {}
3785 else { *dst++ = c; skipSpaces=false; }
3786 }
3787 s.resize(dst-s.data()+1);
3788}
3789
3790/** @brief Class representing an 'create' tag in a template */
3791class TemplateNodeCreate : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeCreate>
3792{
3793 public:
3794 TemplateNodeCreate(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3795 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeCreate>(parser,parent,line)
3796 {
3797 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3798 if (data.isEmpty())
3799 {
3800 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"create tag is missing arguments");
3801 }
3802 int i = data.find(" from ");
3803 if (i==-1)
3804 {
3805 if (data.endsWith(" from"))
3806 {
3807 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"create is missing template name after 'from' keyword");
3808 }
3809 else if (data=="from")
3810 {
3811 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"create needs a file name and a template name");
3812 }
3813 else
3814 {
3815 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"create is missing 'from' keyword");
3816 }
3817 }
3818 else
3819 {
3820 ExpressionParser ep(parser,line);
3821 m_fileExpr = ep.parse(data.left(i).stripWhiteSpace());
3822 m_templateExpr = ep.parse(data.mid(i+6).stripWhiteSpace());
3823 }
3824 }
3825 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
3826 {
3827 AUTO_TRACE();
3828 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3829 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3830 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3831 if (m_templateExpr && m_fileExpr)
3832 {
3833 QCString templateFile = m_templateExpr->resolve(c).toString();
3834 QCString outputFile = m_fileExpr->resolve(c).toString();
3835 if (templateFile.isEmpty())
3836 {
3837 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"empty template name parameter for create command");
3838 }
3839 else if (outputFile.isEmpty())
3840 {
3841 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"empty file name parameter for create command");
3842 }
3843 else
3844 {
3845 TemplateImpl *t = getTemplate();
3846 if (t)
3847 {
3848 QCString extension=outputFile;
3849 int i=extension.findRev('.');
3850 if (i!=-1)
3851 {
3852 extension=extension.right(extension.length()-i-1);
3853 }
3854 t->engine()->setOutputExtension(extension);
3855 Template *ct = t->engine()->loadByName(templateFile,m_line);
3856 TemplateImpl *createTemplate = ct ? dynamic_cast<TemplateImpl*>(ct) : 0;
3857 if (createTemplate)
3858 {
3859 mkpath(ci,outputFile.str());
3860 if (!ci->outputDirectory().isEmpty())
3861 {
3862 outputFile.prepend(ci->outputDirectory()+"/");
3863 }
3864 //printf("NoteCreate(%s)\n",qPrint(outputFile));
3865 std::ofstream f = Portable::openOutputStream(outputFile);
3866 if (f.is_open())
3867 {
3868 TextStream ts(&f);
3869 TemplateEscapeIntf *escIntf = ci->escapeIntf();
3870 ci->selectEscapeIntf(extension);
3871 TextStream os;
3872 createTemplate->render(os,c);
3873 QCString out = os.str();
3874 stripLeadingWhiteSpace(out);
3875 ts << out;
3876 t->engine()->unload(t);
3877 ci->setActiveEscapeIntf(escIntf);
3878 }
3879 else
3880 {
3881 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"failed to open output file '%s' for create command",qPrint(outputFile));
3882 }
3883 }
3884 else
3885 {
3886 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"failed to load template '%s' for include",qPrint(templateFile));
3887 }
3888 t->engine()->setOutputExtension("");
3889 }
3890 }
3891 }
3892 }
3893
3894 private:
3895 ExprAstPtr m_templateExpr;
3896 ExprAstPtr m_fileExpr;
3897};
3898
3899//----------------------------------------------------------
3900
3901/** @brief Class representing an 'tree' tag in a template */
3902class TemplateNodeTree : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeTree>
3903{
3904 struct TreeContext
3905 {
3906 TreeContext(TemplateNodeTree *o,const TemplateListIntfPtr l,TemplateContext *c)
3907 : object(o), list(l), templateCtx(c) {}
3908 TemplateNodeTree *object;
3909 const TemplateListIntfPtr list;
3910 TemplateContext *templateCtx;
3911 };
3912 public:
3913 TemplateNodeTree(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
3914 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeTree>(parser,parent,line)
3915 {
3916 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
3917 ExpressionParser ep(parser,line);
3918 if (data.isEmpty())
3919 {
3920 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"recursetree tag is missing data argument");
3921 }
3922 m_treeExpr = ep.parse(data);
3923 StringVector stopAt = { "endrecursetree" };
3924 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_treeNodes);
3925 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endrecursetree
3926 }
3927 QCString renderChildren(const TreeContext *ctx)
3928 {
3929 AUTO_TRACE();
3930 //printf("TemplateNodeTree::renderChildren(%d)\n",ctx->list->count());
3931 // render all children of node to a string and return it
3932 TemplateContext *c = ctx->templateCtx;
3933 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3934 if (ci==0) return QCString(); // should not happen
3935 TextStream ss;
3936 c->push();
3937 TemplateVariant node;
3938 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = ctx->list->createIterator();
3939 for (it->toFirst();(it->current(node));it->toNext())
3940 {
3941 c->set("node",node);
3942 bool hasChildren=FALSE;
3943 const TemplateStructIntfPtr ns = node.toStruct();
3944 if (ns) // node is a struct
3945 {
3946 TemplateVariant v = ns->get("children");
3947 if (v.isValid()) // with a field 'children'
3948 {
3949 const TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
3950 if (list && list->count()>0) // non-empty list
3951 {
3952 TreeContext childCtx(this,list,ctx->templateCtx);
3953 TemplateVariant children(
3954 [childCtx](const TemplateVariantList &) {
3955 return TemplateVariant(childCtx.object->renderChildren(&childCtx),TRUE);
3956 });
3957 children.setRaw(TRUE);
3958 c->set("children",children);
3959 m_treeNodes.render(ss,c);
3960 hasChildren=TRUE;
3961 }
3962 else if (list==0)
3963 {
3964 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"recursetree: children attribute has type '%s' instead of list",qPrint(v.typeAsString()));
3965 }
3966 }
3967 //else
3968 //{
3969 // ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"recursetree: children attribute is not valid");
3970 //}
3971 }
3972 if (!hasChildren)
3973 {
3974 c->set("children",TemplateVariant("")); // provide default
3975 m_treeNodes.render(ss,c);
3976 }
3977 }
3978 c->pop();
3979 return ss.str();
3980 }
3981 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
3982 {
3983 AUTO_TRACE();
3984 //printf("TemplateNodeTree::render()\n");
3985 TemplateContextImpl* ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
3986 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
3987 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
3988 TemplateVariant v = m_treeExpr->resolve(c);
3989 const TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
3990 if (list)
3991 {
3992 TreeContext ctx(this,list,c);
3993 ts << renderChildren(&ctx);
3994 }
3995 else
3996 {
3997 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"recursetree's argument should be a list type");
3998 }
3999 }
4000
4001 private:
4002 ExprAstPtr m_treeExpr;
4003 TemplateNodeList m_treeNodes;
4004};
4005
4006//----------------------------------------------------------
4007
4008/** @brief Class representing an 'indexentry' tag in a template */
4009class TemplateNodeIndexEntry : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeIndexEntry>
4010{
4011 struct Mapping
4012 {
4013 Mapping(const QCString &n,std::unique_ptr<ExprAst> &&e) : name(n), value(std::move(e)) {}
4014 QCString name;
4015 ExprAstPtr value;
4016 };
4017 public:
4018 TemplateNodeIndexEntry(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4019 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeIndexEntry>(parser,parent,line)
4020 {
4021 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4022 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
4023 std::vector<QCString> args = split(data," ");
4024 auto it = args.begin();
4025 if (it==args.end() || (*it).find('=')!=-1)
4026 {
4027 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"Missing name for indexentry tag");
4028 }
4029 else
4030 {
4031 m_name = *it;
4032 ++it;
4033 while (it!=args.end())
4034 {
4035 QCString arg = *it;
4036 int j=arg.find('=');
4037 if (j>0)
4038 {
4039 ExprAstPtr expr = expParser.parse(arg.mid(j+1));
4040 if (expr)
4041 {
4042 m_args.emplace_back(arg.left(j),std::move(expr));
4043 }
4044 }
4045 else
4046 {
4047 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"invalid argument '%s' for indexentry tag",qPrint(arg));
4048 }
4049 ++it;
4050 }
4051 }
4052 }
4053 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
4054 {
4055 AUTO_TRACE();
4056 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4057 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4058 if (!m_name.isEmpty())
4059 {
4060 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4061 std::vector<TemplateKeyValue> list;
4062 for (const auto &mapping : m_args)
4063 {
4064 list.emplace_back(mapping.name,mapping.value->resolve(c));
4065 }
4066 ci->addIndexEntry(m_name,list);
4067 }
4068 }
4069 private:
4070 QCString m_name;
4071 std::vector<Mapping> m_args;
4072};
4073
4074//----------------------------------------------------------
4075
4076/** @brief Class representing an 'opensubindex' tag in a template */
4077class TemplateNodeOpenSubIndex : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeOpenSubIndex>
4078{
4079 public:
4080 TemplateNodeOpenSubIndex(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4081 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeOpenSubIndex>(parser,parent,line)
4082 {
4083 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4084 m_name = data.stripWhiteSpace();
4085 if (m_name.isEmpty())
4086 {
4087 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"Missing argument for opensubindex tag");
4088 }
4089 else if (m_name.find(' ')!=-1)
4090 {
4091 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"Expected single argument for opensubindex tag got '%s'",qPrint(data));
4092 m_name="";
4093 }
4094 }
4095 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
4096 {
4097 AUTO_TRACE();
4098 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4099 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4100 if (!m_name.isEmpty())
4101 {
4102 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4103 ci->openSubIndex(m_name);
4104 }
4105 }
4106 private:
4107 QCString m_name;
4108};
4109
4110//----------------------------------------------------------
4111
4112/** @brief Class representing an 'closesubindex' tag in a template */
4113class TemplateNodeCloseSubIndex : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeCloseSubIndex>
4114{
4115 public:
4116 TemplateNodeCloseSubIndex(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4117 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeCloseSubIndex>(parser,parent,line)
4118 {
4119 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4120 m_name = data.stripWhiteSpace();
4121 if (m_name.isEmpty())
4122 {
4123 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"Missing argument for closesubindex tag");
4124 }
4125 else if (m_name.find(' ')!=-1 || m_name.isEmpty())
4126 {
4127 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"Expected single argument for closesubindex tag got '%s'",qPrint(data));
4128 m_name="";
4129 }
4130 }
4131 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
4132 {
4133 AUTO_TRACE();
4134 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4135 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4136 if (!m_name.isEmpty())
4137 {
4138 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4139 ci->closeSubIndex(m_name);
4140 }
4141 }
4142 private:
4143 QCString m_name;
4144};
4145
4146
4147//----------------------------------------------------------
4148
4149/** @brief Class representing an 'with' tag in a template */
4150class TemplateNodeWith : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeWith>
4151{
4152 struct Mapping
4153 {
4154 Mapping(const QCString &n,ExprAstPtr &&e) : name(n), value(std::move(e)) {}
4155 QCString name;
4156 ExprAstPtr value;
4157 };
4158 public:
4159 TemplateNodeWith(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4160 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeWith>(parser,parent,line)
4161 {
4162 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4163 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
4164 QCString filteredData = data;
4165 removeSpacesAroundEquals(filteredData);
4166 std::vector<QCString> args = split(filteredData," ");
4167 auto it = args.begin();
4168 while (it!=args.end())
4169 {
4170 QCString arg = *it;
4171 int j=arg.find('=');
4172 if (j>0)
4173 {
4174 ExprAstPtr expr = expParser.parse(arg.mid(j+1));
4175 if (expr)
4176 {
4177 m_args.emplace_back(arg.left(j),std::move(expr));
4178 }
4179 }
4180 else
4181 {
4182 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"invalid argument '%s' for 'with' tag",qPrint(arg));
4183 }
4184 ++it;
4185 }
4186 StringVector stopAt = { "endwith" };
4187 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
4188 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endwith
4189 }
4190 ~TemplateNodeWith()
4191 {
4192 }
4193 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
4194 {
4195 AUTO_TRACE();
4196 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4197 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4198 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4199 c->push();
4200 for (const auto &mapping : m_args)
4201 {
4202 TemplateVariant value = mapping.value->resolve(c);
4203 ci->set(mapping.name,value);
4204 }
4205 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
4206 c->pop();
4207 }
4208 private:
4209 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
4210 std::vector<Mapping> m_args;
4211};
4212
4213//----------------------------------------------------------
4214
4215/** @brief Class representing an 'cycle' tag in a template */
4216class TemplateNodeCycle : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeCycle>
4217{
4218 public:
4219 TemplateNodeCycle(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4220 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeCycle>(parser,parent,line)
4221 {
4222 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4223 m_index=0;
4224 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
4225 std::vector<QCString> args = split(data," ");
4226 auto it = args.begin();
4227 while (it!=args.end())
4228 {
4229 ExprAstPtr expr = expParser.parse(*it);
4230 if (expr)
4231 {
4232 m_args.emplace_back(std::move(expr));
4233 }
4234 ++it;
4235 }
4236 if (m_args.size()<2)
4237 {
4238 parser->warn(parser->templateName(),line,"expected at least two arguments for cycle command, got %zu",m_args.size());
4239 }
4240 }
4241 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
4242 {
4243 AUTO_TRACE();
4244 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4245 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4246 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4247 if (m_index<m_args.size())
4248 {
4249 TemplateVariant v = m_args[m_index]->resolve(c);
4250 if (v.isFunction())
4251 {
4252 v = v.call();
4253 }
4254 if (ci->escapeIntf() && !v.raw())
4255 {
4256 if (ci->needsRecoding())
4257 {
4258 ts << ci->recode(ci->escapeIntf()->escape(v.toString()));
4259 }
4260 else
4261 {
4262 ts << ci->escapeIntf()->escape(v.toString());
4263 }
4264 }
4265 else
4266 {
4267 if (ci->needsRecoding())
4268 {
4269 ts << ci->recode(v.toString());
4270 }
4271 else
4272 {
4273 ts << v.toString();
4274 }
4275 }
4276 }
4277 if (++m_index==m_args.size()) // wrap around
4278 {
4279 m_index=0;
4280 }
4281 }
4282 private:
4283 size_t m_index = 0;
4284 ExprAstList m_args;
4285};
4286
4287//----------------------------------------------------------
4288
4289/** @brief Class representing an 'set' tag in a template */
4290class TemplateNodeSet : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeSet>
4291{
4292 struct Mapping
4293 {
4294 Mapping(const QCString &n,ExprAstPtr &&e) : name(n), value(std::move(e)) {}
4295 QCString name;
4296 ExprAstPtr value;
4297 };
4298 public:
4299 TemplateNodeSet(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4300 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeSet>(parser,parent,line)
4301 {
4302 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4303 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
4304 // data format: name=expression
4305 int j=data.find('=');
4306 ExprAstPtr expr = 0;
4307 if (j>0 && (expr = expParser.parse(data.mid(j+1))))
4308 {
4309 m_mapping = std::make_unique<Mapping>(data.left(j),std::move(expr));
4310 }
4311 }
4312 ~TemplateNodeSet()
4313 {
4314 }
4315 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
4316 {
4317 AUTO_TRACE();
4318 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4319 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4320 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4321 if (m_mapping)
4322 {
4323 TemplateVariant value = m_mapping->value->resolve(c);
4324 ci->set(m_mapping->name,value);
4325 }
4326 }
4327 private:
4328 std::unique_ptr<Mapping> m_mapping;
4329};
4330
4331//----------------------------------------------------------
4332
4333/** @brief Class representing an 'spaceless' tag in a template */
4334class TemplateNodeSpaceless : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeSpaceless>
4335{
4336 public:
4337 TemplateNodeSpaceless(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &)
4338 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeSpaceless>(parser,parent,line)
4339 {
4340 AUTO_TRACE();
4341 StringVector stopAt = { "endspaceless" };
4342 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
4343 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endwith
4344 }
4345 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
4346 {
4347 AUTO_TRACE();
4348 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4349 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4350 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4351 bool wasSpaceless = ci->spacelessEnabled();
4352 ci->enableSpaceless(TRUE);
4353 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
4354 ci->enableSpaceless(wasSpaceless);
4355 }
4356 private:
4357 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
4358};
4359
4360//----------------------------------------------------------
4361
4362/** @brief Class representing an 'markers' tag in a template */
4363class TemplateNodeMarkers : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeMarkers>
4364{
4365 public:
4366 TemplateNodeMarkers(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4367 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeMarkers>(parser,parent,line)
4368 {
4369 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4370 int i = data.find(" in ");
4371 int w = data.find(" with ");
4372 if (i==-1 || w==-1 || w<i)
4373 {
4374 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"markers tag as wrong format. Expected: markers <var> in <list> with <string_with_markers>");
4375 }
4376 else
4377 {
4378 ExpressionParser expParser(parser,line);
4379 m_var = data.left(i);
4380 m_listExpr = expParser.parse(data.mid(i+4,w-i-4));
4381 m_patternExpr = expParser.parse(data.right(data.length()-w-6));
4382 }
4383 StringVector stopAt = { "endmarkers" };
4384 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
4385 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endmarkers
4386 }
4387 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
4388 {
4389 AUTO_TRACE();
4390 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4391 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4392 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4393 if (!m_var.isEmpty() && m_listExpr && m_patternExpr)
4394 {
4395 TemplateVariant v = m_listExpr->resolve(c);
4396 const TemplateListIntfPtr list = v.toList();
4397 TemplateVariant patternStr = m_patternExpr->resolve(c);
4398 if (list)
4399 {
4400 if (patternStr.isString())
4401 {
4402 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
4403 c->push();
4404 std::string str = patternStr.toString().str();
4405
4406 static const reg::Ex marker(R"(@\d+)");
4407 reg::Iterator re_it(str,marker);
4408 reg::Iterator end;
4409 size_t index=0;
4410 for ( ; re_it!=end ; ++re_it)
4411 {
4412 const auto &match = *re_it;
4413 size_t newIndex = match.position();
4414 size_t matchLen = match.length();
4415 std::string part = str.substr(index,newIndex-index);
4416 if (ci->needsRecoding())
4417 {
4418 ts << ci->recode(QCString(part)); // write text before marker
4419 }
4420 else
4421 {
4422 ts << part; // write text before marker
4423 }
4424 unsigned long entryIndex = std::stoul(match.str().substr(1));
4425 TemplateVariant var;
4426 size_t i=0;
4427 // search for list element at position id
4428 for (it->toFirst(); (it->current(var)) && i<entryIndex; it->toNext(),i++) {}
4429 if (i==entryIndex) // found element
4430 {
4431 TemplateStructPtr s = TemplateStruct::alloc();
4432 s->set("id",i);
4433 c->set("markers",std::static_pointer_cast<TemplateStructIntf>(s));
4434 c->set(m_var,var); // define local variable to hold element of list type
4435 bool wasSpaceless = ci->spacelessEnabled();
4436 ci->enableSpaceless(TRUE);
4437 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
4438 ci->enableSpaceless(wasSpaceless);
4439 }
4440 else if (i<entryIndex)
4441 {
4442 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"markers list does not an element for marker position %d",i);
4443 }
4444 index=newIndex+matchLen; // set index just after marker
4445 }
4446 if (ci->needsRecoding())
4447 {
4448 ts << ci->recode(str.substr(index)); // write text after last marker
4449 }
4450 else
4451 {
4452 ts << str.substr(index); // write text after last marker
4453 }
4454 c->pop();
4455 }
4456 else
4457 {
4458 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"markers requires a parameter of string type after 'with'!");
4459 }
4460 }
4461 else
4462 {
4463 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"markers requires a parameter of list type after 'in'!");
4464 }
4465 }
4466 }
4467 private:
4468 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
4469 QCString m_var;
4470 ExprAstPtr m_listExpr;
4471 ExprAstPtr m_patternExpr;
4472};
4473
4474//----------------------------------------------------------
4475
4476/** @brief Class representing an 'tabbing' tag in a template */
4477class TemplateNodeTabbing : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeTabbing>
4478{
4479 public:
4480 TemplateNodeTabbing(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &)
4481 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeTabbing>(parser,parent,line)
4482 {
4483 AUTO_TRACE();
4484 StringVector stopAt = { "endtabbing" };
4485 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
4486 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endtabbing
4487 }
4488 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
4489 {
4490 AUTO_TRACE();
4491 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4492 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4493 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4494 bool wasTabbing = ci->tabbingEnabled();
4495 ci->enableTabbing(TRUE);
4496 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
4497 ci->enableTabbing(wasTabbing);
4498 }
4499 private:
4500 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
4501};
4502
4503//----------------------------------------------------------
4504
4505/** @brief Class representing an 'markers' tag in a template */
4506class TemplateNodeResource : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeResource>
4507{
4508 public:
4509 TemplateNodeResource(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4510 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeResource>(parser,parent,line)
4511 {
4512 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4513 ExpressionParser ep(parser,line);
4514 int i;
4515 if (data.isEmpty())
4516 {
4517 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"resource tag is missing resource file argument");
4518 m_resExpr.reset();
4519 m_asExpr.reset();
4520 }
4521 else if ((i=data.find(" as "))!=-1) // resource a as b
4522 {
4523 m_resExpr = ep.parse(data.left(i)); // part before as
4524 m_asExpr = ep.parse(data.mid(i+4)); // part after as
4525 }
4526 else if ((i=data.find(" append "))!=-1) // resource a appends to b
4527 {
4528 m_resExpr = ep.parse(data.left(i)); // part before append
4529 m_asExpr = ep.parse(data.mid(i+8)); // part after append
4530 m_append = true;
4531 }
4532 else // resource a
4533 {
4534 m_resExpr = ep.parse(data);
4535 m_asExpr.reset();
4536 }
4537 }
4538 void render(TextStream &, TemplateContext *c)
4539 {
4540 AUTO_TRACE();
4541 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4542 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4543 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4544 if (m_resExpr)
4545 {
4546 QCString resourceFile = m_resExpr->resolve(c).toString();
4547 if (resourceFile.isEmpty())
4548 {
4549 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"invalid parameter for resource command");
4550 }
4551 else
4552 {
4553 QCString outputDirectory = ci->outputDirectory();
4554 if (m_asExpr)
4555 {
4556 QCString targetFile = m_asExpr->resolve(c).toString();
4557 mkpath(ci,targetFile.str());
4558 if (targetFile.isEmpty())
4559 {
4560 ci->warn(m_templateName,m_line,"invalid parameter at right side of '%s' for resource command", m_append ? "append" : "as");
4561 }
4562 else
4563 {
4564 ResourceMgr::instance().copyResourceAs(resourceFile,outputDirectory,targetFile,m_append);
4565 }
4566 }
4567 else
4568 {
4569 ResourceMgr::instance().copyResource(resourceFile,outputDirectory);
4570 }
4571 }
4572 }
4573 }
4574 private:
4575 ExprAstPtr m_resExpr;
4576 ExprAstPtr m_asExpr;
4577 bool m_append = false;
4578};
4579
4580//----------------------------------------------------------
4581
4582/** @brief Class representing the 'encoding' tag in a template */
4583class TemplateNodeEncoding : public TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeEncoding>
4584{
4585 public:
4586 TemplateNodeEncoding(TemplateParser *parser,TemplateNode *parent,int line,const QCString &data)
4587 : TemplateNodeCreator<TemplateNodeEncoding>(parser,parent,line)
4588 {
4589 AUTO_TRACE("data={}",Trace::trunc(data));
4590 ExpressionParser ep(parser,line);
4591 if (data.isEmpty())
4592 {
4593 parser->warn(m_templateName,line,"encoding tag is missing encoding argument");
4594 m_encExpr.reset();
4595 }
4596 else
4597 {
4598 m_encExpr = ep.parse(data);
4599 }
4600 StringVector stopAt = { "endencoding" };
4601 parser->parse(this,line,stopAt,m_nodes);
4602 parser->removeNextToken(); // skip over endencoding
4603 }
4604 void render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
4605 {
4606 AUTO_TRACE();
4607 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
4608 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
4609 ci->setLocation(m_templateName,m_line);
4610 QCString encStr;
4611 if (m_encExpr)
4612 {
4613 encStr = m_encExpr->resolve(c).toString();
4614 }
4615 QCString oldEncStr = ci->encoding();
4616 if (!encStr.isEmpty())
4617 {
4618 ci->setEncoding(m_templateName,m_line,encStr);
4619 }
4620 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
4621 ci->setEncoding(m_templateName,m_line,oldEncStr);
4622 }
4623 private:
4624 ExprAstPtr m_encExpr;
4625 TemplateNodeList m_nodes;
4626};
4627
4628//----------------------------------------------------------
4629
4630/** @brief Factory class for creating tag AST nodes found in a template */
4631class TemplateNodeFactory
4632{
4633 public:
4634 typedef TemplateNodePtr (*CreateFunc)(TemplateParser *parser,
4635 TemplateNode *parent,
4636 int line,
4637 const QCString &data);
4638
4639 static TemplateNodeFactory &instance()
4640 {
4641 static std::unique_ptr<TemplateNodeFactory> instance;
4642 if (instance==0) instance = std::make_unique<TemplateNodeFactory>();
4643 return *instance;
4644 }
4645
4646 TemplateNodePtr create(const QCString &name,
4647 TemplateParser *parser,
4648 TemplateNode *parent,
4649 int line,
4650 const QCString &data)
4651 {
4652 auto it = m_registry.find(name.str());
4653 if (it==m_registry.end()) return 0;
4654 return it->second(parser,parent,line,data);
4655 }
4656
4657 void registerTemplateNode(const QCString &name,CreateFunc func)
4658 {
4659 m_registry.insert(std::make_pair(name.str(),func));
4660 }
4661
4662 /** @brief Helper class for registering a template AST node */
4663 template<class T> class AutoRegister
4664 {
4665 public:
4666 AutoRegister(const QCString &key)
4667 {
4668 TemplateNodeFactory::instance().registerTemplateNode(key,T::createInstance);
4669 }
4670 };
4671
4672 private:
4673 std::unordered_map<std::string,CreateFunc> m_registry;
4674};
4675
4676// register a handler for each start tag we support
4677static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeIf> autoRefIf("if");
4678static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeFor> autoRefFor("for");
4679static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeMsg> autoRefMsg("msg");
4680static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeSet> autoRefSet("set");
4681static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeTree> autoRefTree("recursetree");
4682static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeWith> autoRefWith("with");
4683static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeBlock> autoRefBlock("block");
4684static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeCycle> autoRefCycle("cycle");
4685static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeRange> autoRefRange("range");
4686static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeExtend> autoRefExtend("extend");
4687static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeCreate> autoRefCreate("create");
4688static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeRepeat> autoRefRepeat("repeat");
4689static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeInclude> autoRefInclude("include");
4690static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeMarkers> autoRefMarkers("markers");
4691static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeTabbing> autoRefTabbing("tabbing");
4692static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeResource> autoRefResource("resource");
4693static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeEncoding> autoRefEncoding("encoding");
4694static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeSpaceless> autoRefSpaceless("spaceless");
4695static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeIndexEntry> autoRefIndexEntry("indexentry");
4696static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeOpenSubIndex> autoRefOpenSubIndex("opensubindex");
4697static TemplateNodeFactory::AutoRegister<TemplateNodeCloseSubIndex> autoRefCloseSubIndex("closesubindex");
4698
4699//----------------------------------------------------------
4700
4701TemplateBlockContext::TemplateBlockContext()
4702{
4703}
4704
4705TemplateNodeBlock *TemplateBlockContext::get(const QCString &name) const
4706{
4707 auto it = m_blocks.find(name.str());
4708 if (it==m_blocks.end() || it->second.empty())
4709 {
4710 return 0;
4711 }
4712 else
4713 {
4714 return it->second.back();
4715 }
4716}
4717
4718TemplateNodeBlock *TemplateBlockContext::pop(const QCString &name)
4719{
4720 auto it = m_blocks.find(name.str());
4721 if (it==m_blocks.end() || it->second.empty())
4722 {
4723 return 0;
4724 }
4725 else
4726 {
4727 TemplateNodeBlock *bld = it->second.back();
4728 it->second.pop_back();
4729 return bld;
4730 }
4731}
4732
4733void TemplateBlockContext::add(TemplateNodeBlock *block)
4734{
4735 auto it = m_blocks.find(block->name().str());
4736 if (it==m_blocks.end())
4737 {
4738 it = m_blocks.insert(std::make_pair(block->name().str(),NodeBlockList())).first;
4739 }
4740 it->second.push_front(block);
4741}
4742
4743void TemplateBlockContext::add(TemplateBlockContext *ctx)
4744{
4745 for (auto &[name,blocks] : ctx->m_blocks)
4746 {
4747 for (auto &nb : blocks)
4748 {
4749 add(nb);
4750 }
4751 }
4752}
4753
4754void TemplateBlockContext::clear()
4755{
4756 m_blocks.clear();
4757}
4758
4759void TemplateBlockContext::push(TemplateNodeBlock *block)
4760{
4761 auto it = m_blocks.find(block->name().str());
4762 if (it==m_blocks.end())
4763 {
4764 it = m_blocks.insert(std::make_pair(block->name().str(),NodeBlockList())).first;
4765 }
4766 it->second.push_back(block);
4767}
4768
4769
4770//----------------------------------------------------------
4771
4772/** @brief Lexer class for turning a template into a list of tokens */
4773class TemplateLexer
4774{
4775 public:
4776 TemplateLexer(const TemplateEngine *engine,const QCString &fileName,const QCString &data);
4777 void tokenize(TemplateTokenStream &tokens);
4778 void setOpenCloseCharacters(char openChar,char closeChar)
4779 { m_openChar=openChar; m_closeChar=closeChar; }
4780 private:
4781 void addToken(TemplateTokenStream &tokens,
4782 const QCString &data,int line,int startPos,int endPos,
4783 TemplateToken::Type type);
4784 void reset();
4785 const TemplateEngine *m_engine = 0;
4786 QCString m_fileName;
4787 QCString m_data;
4788 char m_openChar = 0;
4789 char m_closeChar = 0;
4790};
4791
4792TemplateLexer::TemplateLexer(const TemplateEngine *engine,const QCString &fileName,const QCString &data) :
4793 m_engine(engine), m_fileName(fileName), m_data(data)
4794{
4795 m_openChar='{';
4796 m_closeChar='}';
4797}
4798
4799void TemplateLexer::tokenize(TemplateTokenStream &tokens)
4800{
4801 enum LexerStates
4802 {
4803 StateText,
4804 StateBeginTemplate,
4805 StateTag,
4806 StateEndTag,
4807 StateComment,
4808 StateEndComment,
4809 StateMaybeVar,
4810 StateVariable,
4811 StateEndVariable
4812 };
4813
4814 if (m_data.isEmpty()) return;
4815 const char *p=m_data.data();
4816 int state=StateText;
4817 int pos=0;
4818 int lastTokenPos=0;
4819 int startLinePos=0;
4820 bool emptyOutputLine=TRUE;
4821 int line=1;
4822 char c;
4823 int markStartPos=-1;
4824 for (;(c=*p);p++,pos++)
4825 {
4826 switch (state)
4827 {
4828 case StateText:
4829 if (c==m_openChar) // {{ or {% or {# or something else
4830 {
4831 state=StateBeginTemplate;
4832 }
4833 else if (c!=' ' && c!='\t' && c!='\n') // non-whitespace text
4834 {
4835 emptyOutputLine=FALSE;
4836 }
4837 break;
4838 case StateBeginTemplate:
4839 switch (c)
4840 {
4841 case '%': // {%
4842 state=StateTag;
4843 markStartPos=pos-1;
4844 break;
4845 case '#': // {#
4846 state=StateComment;
4847 markStartPos=pos-1;
4848 break;
4849 case '{': // {{
4850 if (m_openChar=='{')
4851 {
4852 state=StateMaybeVar;
4853 }
4854 else
4855 {
4856 state=StateVariable;
4857 }
4858 markStartPos=pos-1;
4859 break;
4860 default:
4861 state=StateText;
4862 emptyOutputLine=FALSE;
4863 break;
4864 }
4865 break;
4866 case StateTag:
4867 if (c=='\n')
4868 {
4869 warn(m_fileName,line,"unexpected new line inside %c%%...%%%c block",m_openChar,m_closeChar);
4870 m_engine->printIncludeContext(m_fileName,line);
4871 }
4872 else if (c=='%') // %} or something else
4873 {
4874 state=StateEndTag;
4875 }
4876 break;
4877 case StateEndTag:
4878 if (c==m_closeChar) // %}
4879 {
4880 // found tag!
4881 state=StateText;
4882 addToken(tokens,m_data,line,lastTokenPos,
4883 emptyOutputLine ? startLinePos : markStartPos,
4884 TemplateToken::Text);
4885 addToken(tokens,m_data,line,markStartPos+2,
4886 pos-1,TemplateToken::Block);
4887 lastTokenPos = pos+1;
4888 }
4889 else // something else
4890 {
4891 if (c=='\n')
4892 {
4893 warn(m_fileName,line,"unexpected new line inside %c%%...%%%c block",m_openChar,m_closeChar);
4894 m_engine->printIncludeContext(m_fileName,line);
4895 }
4896 state=StateTag;
4897 }
4898 break;
4899 case StateComment:
4900 if (c=='\n')
4901 {
4902 warn(m_fileName,line,"unexpected new line inside %c#...#%c block",m_openChar,m_closeChar);
4903 m_engine->printIncludeContext(m_fileName,line);
4904 }
4905 else if (c=='#') // #} or something else
4906 {
4907 state=StateEndComment;
4908 }
4909 break;
4910 case StateEndComment:
4911 if (c==m_closeChar) // #}
4912 {
4913 // found comment tag!
4914 state=StateText;
4915 addToken(tokens,m_data,line,lastTokenPos,
4916 emptyOutputLine ? startLinePos : markStartPos,
4917 TemplateToken::Text);
4918 lastTokenPos = pos+1;
4919 }
4920 else // something else
4921 {
4922 if (c=='\n')
4923 {
4924 warn(m_fileName,line,"unexpected new line inside %c#...#%c block",m_openChar,m_closeChar);
4925 m_engine->printIncludeContext(m_fileName,line);
4926 }
4927 state=StateComment;
4928 }
4929 break;
4930 case StateMaybeVar:
4931 switch (c)
4932 {
4933 case '#': // {{#
4934 state=StateComment;
4935 markStartPos=pos-1;
4936 break;
4937 case '%': // {{%
4938 state=StateTag;
4939 markStartPos=pos-1;
4940 break;
4941 default: // {{
4942 state=StateVariable;
4943 break;
4944 }
4945 break;
4946 case StateVariable:
4947 emptyOutputLine=FALSE; // assume a variable expands to content
4948 if (c=='\n')
4949 {
4950 warn(m_fileName,line,"unexpected new line inside %c{...}%c block",m_openChar,m_closeChar);
4951 m_engine->printIncludeContext(m_fileName,line);
4952 }
4953 else if (c=='}') // }} or something else
4954 {
4955 state=StateEndVariable;
4956 }
4957 break;
4958 case StateEndVariable:
4959 if (c==m_closeChar) // }}
4960 {
4961 // found variable tag!
4962 state=StateText;
4963 addToken(tokens,m_data,line,lastTokenPos,
4964 emptyOutputLine ? startLinePos : markStartPos,
4965 TemplateToken::Text);
4966 addToken(tokens,m_data,line,markStartPos+2,
4967 pos-1,TemplateToken::Variable);
4968 lastTokenPos = pos+1;
4969 }
4970 else // something else
4971 {
4972 if (c=='\n')
4973 {
4974 warn(m_fileName,line,"unexpected new line inside %c{...}%c block",m_openChar,m_closeChar);
4975 m_engine->printIncludeContext(m_fileName,line);
4976 }
4977 state=StateVariable;
4978 }
4979 break;
4980 }
4981 if (c=='\n') // new line
4982 {
4983 state=StateText;
4984 startLinePos=pos+1;
4985 // if the current line only contain commands and whitespace,
4986 // then skip it in the output by moving lastTokenPos
4987 if (markStartPos!=-1 && emptyOutputLine) lastTokenPos = startLinePos;
4988 // reset markers
4989 markStartPos=-1;
4990 line++;
4991 emptyOutputLine=TRUE;
4992 }
4993 }
4994 if (lastTokenPos<pos)
4995 {
4996 addToken(tokens,m_data,line,
4997 lastTokenPos,pos,
4998 TemplateToken::Text);
4999 }
5000}
5001
5002void TemplateLexer::addToken(TemplateTokenStream &tokens,
5003 const QCString &data,int line,
5004 int startPos,int endPos,
5005 TemplateToken::Type type)
5006{
5007 if (startPos<endPos)
5008 {
5009 int len = endPos-startPos;
5010 QCString text = data.mid(startPos,len);
5011 if (type!=TemplateToken::Text) text = text.stripWhiteSpace();
5012 tokens.push_back(std::make_unique<TemplateToken>(type,text,line));
5013 }
5014}
5015
5016//----------------------------------------------------------
5017
5018TemplateParser::TemplateParser(const TemplateEngine *engine,
5019 const QCString &templateName,
5020 TemplateTokenStream &tokens) :
5021 m_engine(engine), m_templateName(templateName), m_tokens(tokens)
5022{
5023}
5024
5025void TemplateParser::parse(
5026 TemplateNode *parent,int line,const StringVector &stopAt,
5027 TemplateNodeList &nodes)
5028{
5029 AUTO_TRACE();
5030 // process the tokens. Build node list
5031 while (hasNextToken())
5032 {
5033 auto tok = takeNextToken();
5034 AUTO_TRACE_ADD("Token type={} data='{}' line={}", static_cast<int>(tok->type),Trace::trunc(tok->data),tok->line);
5035 switch(tok->type)
5036 {
5037 case TemplateToken::Text:
5038 nodes.push_back(std::make_unique<TemplateNodeText>(this,parent,tok->line,tok->data));
5039 break;
5040 case TemplateToken::Variable: // {{ var }}
5041 nodes.push_back(std::make_unique<TemplateNodeVariable>(this,parent,tok->line,tok->data));
5042 break;
5043 case TemplateToken::Block: // {% tag %}
5044 {
5045 QCString command = tok->data;
5046 int sep = command.find(' ');
5047 if (sep!=-1)
5048 {
5049 command=command.left(sep);
5050 }
5051 TemplateToken *tok_ptr = tok.get();
5052 if (std::find(stopAt.begin(),stopAt.end(),command.str())!=stopAt.end())
5053 {
5054 prependToken(std::move(tok));
5055 AUTO_TRACE_EXIT("stop");
5056 return;
5057 }
5058 QCString arg;
5059 if (sep!=-1)
5060 {
5061 arg = tok_ptr->data.mid(sep+1);
5062 }
5063 TemplateNodePtr node = TemplateNodeFactory::instance().create(
5064 command,this,parent,tok_ptr->line,arg);
5065 if (node)
5066 {
5067 nodes.push_back(std::move(node));
5068 }
5069 else if (command=="empty" || command=="else" ||
5070 command=="endif" || command=="endfor" ||
5071 command=="endblock" || command=="endwith" ||
5072 command=="endrecursetree" || command=="endspaceless" ||
5073 command=="endmarkers" || command=="endmsg" ||
5074 command=="endrepeat" || command=="elif" ||
5075 command=="endrange" || command=="endtabbing" ||
5076 command=="endencoding")
5077 {
5078 warn(m_templateName,tok_ptr->line,"Found tag '%s' without matching start tag",qPrint(command));
5079 }
5080 else
5081 {
5082 warn(m_templateName,tok_ptr->line,"Unknown tag '%s'",qPrint(command));
5083 }
5084 }
5085 break;
5086 }
5087 }
5088 if (!stopAt.empty())
5089 {
5090 QCString options;
5091 for (const auto &s : stopAt)
5092 {
5093 if (!options.isEmpty()) options+=", ";
5094 options+=s.c_str();
5095 }
5096 warn(m_templateName,line,"Unclosed tag in template, expected one of: %s",
5097 qPrint(options));
5098 }
5099 AUTO_TRACE_EXIT("last token");
5100}
5101
5102bool TemplateParser::hasNextToken() const
5103{
5104 return !m_tokens.empty();
5105}
5106
5107TemplateTokenPtr TemplateParser::takeNextToken()
5108{
5109 if (m_tokens.empty()) return TemplateTokenPtr();
5110 auto tok = std::move(m_tokens.front());
5111 m_tokens.pop_front();
5112 return tok;
5113}
5114
5115const TemplateToken *TemplateParser::currentToken() const
5116{
5117 return m_tokens.front().get();
5118}
5119
5120void TemplateParser::removeNextToken()
5121{
5122 m_tokens.pop_front();
5123}
5124
5125void TemplateParser::prependToken(TemplateTokenPtr &&token)
5126{
5127 m_tokens.push_front(std::move(token));
5128}
5129
5130void TemplateParser::warn(const QCString &fileName,int line,const char *fmt,...) const
5131{
5132 va_list args;
5133 va_start(args,fmt);
5134 va_warn(fileName,line,fmt,args);
5135 va_end(args);
5136 m_engine->printIncludeContext(fileName,line);
5137}
5138
5139
5140
5141//----------------------------------------------------------
5142
5143
5144TemplateImpl::TemplateImpl(TemplateEngine *engine,const QCString &name,const QCString &data,
5145 const QCString &extension)
5146 : TemplateNode(0)
5147{
5148 //printf("%p:TemplateImpl::TemplateImpl(%s)\n",(void*)this,qPrint(name));
5149 m_name = name;
5150 m_engine = engine;
5151 TemplateLexer lexer(engine,name,data);
5152 if (extension=="tex")
5153 {
5154 lexer.setOpenCloseCharacters('<','>');
5155 }
5156 TemplateTokenStream tokens;
5157 lexer.tokenize(tokens);
5158 TemplateParser parser(engine,name,tokens);
5159 parser.parse(this,1,StringVector(),m_nodes);
5160}
5161
5162TemplateImpl::~TemplateImpl()
5163{
5164 //printf("%p:TemplateImpl::~TemplateImpl(%s)\n",(void*)this,qPrint(m_name));
5165}
5166
5167void TemplateImpl::render(TextStream &ts, TemplateContext *c)
5168{
5169 TemplateContextImpl *ci = dynamic_cast<TemplateContextImpl*>(c);
5170 if (ci==0) return; // should not happen
5171 if (!m_nodes.empty())
5172 {
5173 TemplateNodeExtend *ne = dynamic_cast<TemplateNodeExtend*>(m_nodes.front().get());
5174 if (ne==0) // normal template, add blocks to block context
5175 {
5176 TemplateBlockContext *bc = ci->blockContext();
5177 for (const auto &n : m_nodes)
5178 {
5179 TemplateNodeBlock *nb = dynamic_cast<TemplateNodeBlock*>(n.get());
5180 if (nb)
5181 {
5182 bc->add(nb);
5183 }
5184 }
5185 }
5186 m_nodes.render(ts,c);
5187 }
5188}
5189
5190//----------------------------------------------------------
5191
5192/** @brief Private data of the template engine */
5193class TemplateEngine::Private
5194{
5195 class IncludeEntry
5196 {
5197 public:
5198 enum Type { Template, Block };
5199 IncludeEntry(Type type,const QCString &fileName,const QCString &blockName,int line)
5200 : m_type(type), m_fileName(fileName), m_blockName(blockName), m_line(line) {}
5201 Type type() const { return m_type; }
5202 QCString fileName() const { return m_fileName; }
5203 QCString blockName() const { return m_blockName; }
5204 int line() const { return m_line; }
5205
5206 private:
5207 Type m_type = Template;
5208 QCString m_fileName;
5209 QCString m_blockName;
5210 int m_line = 0;
5211 };
5212 public:
5213 Private(TemplateEngine *engine) : m_engine(engine)
5214 {
5215 //printf("%p:TemplateEngine::Private::Private()\n",(void*)this);
5216 }
5217 ~Private()
5218 {
5219 //printf("%p:TemplateEngine::Private::~Private()\n",(void*)this);
5220 }
5221 Template *loadByName(const QCString &fileName,int line)
5222 {
5223 //for (int i=0;i<m_indent;i++) printf(" ");
5224 //m_indent++;
5225 //printf("loadByName(%s,%d) {\n",qPrint(fileName),line);
5226 m_includeStack.emplace_back(IncludeEntry::Template,fileName,QCString(),line);
5227 auto kv = m_templateCache.find(fileName.str());
5228 if (kv==m_templateCache.end()) // first time template is referenced
5229 {
5230 QCString filePath = m_templateDirName+"/"+fileName;
5231 std::ifstream f = Portable::openInputStream(filePath,true);
5232 if (f.is_open()) // read template from disk
5233 {
5234 FileInfo fi(filePath.str());
5235 size_t size=fi.size();
5236 QCString data(size+1);
5237 f.read(data.rawData(),size);
5238 if (!f.fail())
5239 {
5240 kv = m_templateCache.insert(
5241 std::make_pair(fileName.str(),
5242 std::make_unique<TemplateImpl>(m_engine,filePath,data,m_extension))).first;
5243 }
5244 }
5245 else // fallback to default built-in template
5246 {
5247 const QCString data = ResourceMgr::instance().getAsString(fileName);
5248 if (!data.isEmpty())
5249 {
5250 kv = m_templateCache.insert(
5251 std::make_pair(fileName.str(),
5252 std::make_unique<TemplateImpl>(m_engine,fileName,data,m_extension))).first;
5253 }
5254 else
5255 {
5256 err("Could not open template file %s\n",qPrint(fileName));
5257 }
5258 }
5259 }
5260 return kv!=m_templateCache.end() ? kv->second.get() : 0;
5261 }
5262
5263 void unload(Template * /*t*/)
5264 {
5265 //(void)t;
5266 //m_indent--;
5267 //for (int i=0;i<m_indent;i++) printf(" ");
5268 //printf("}\n");
5269 m_includeStack.pop_back();
5270 }
5271
5272 void enterBlock(const QCString &fileName,const QCString &blockName,int line)
5273 {
5274 //for (int i=0;i<m_indent;i++) printf(" ");
5275 //m_indent++;
5276 //printf("enterBlock(%s,%s,%d) {\n",qPrint(fileName),qPrint(blockName),line);
5277 m_includeStack.emplace_back(IncludeEntry::Block,fileName,blockName,line);
5278 }
5279
5280 void leaveBlock()
5281 {
5282 //m_indent--;
5283 //for (int i=0;i<m_indent;i++) printf(" ");
5284 //printf("}\n");
5285 m_includeStack.pop_back();
5286 }
5287
5288 void printIncludeContext(const QCString &fileName,int line) const
5289 {
5290 auto it = m_includeStack.rbegin();
5291 while (it!=m_includeStack.rend())
5292 {
5293 const IncludeEntry &ie = *it;
5294 ++it;
5295 const IncludeEntry *next = it!=m_includeStack.rend() ? &(*it) : 0;
5296 if (ie.type()==IncludeEntry::Template)
5297 {
5298 if (next)
5299 {
5300 warn(fileName,line," inside template '%s' included from template '%s' at line %d",qPrint(ie.fileName()),qPrint(next->fileName()),ie.line());
5301 }
5302 }
5303 else // ie.type()==IncludeEntry::Block
5304 {
5305 warn(fileName,line," included by block '%s' inside template '%s' at line %d",qPrint(ie.blockName()),
5306 qPrint(ie.fileName()),ie.line());
5307 }
5308 }
5309 }
5310
5311 void setOutputExtension(const QCString &extension)
5312 {
5313 m_extension = extension;
5314 }
5315
5316 QCString outputExtension() const
5317 {
5318 return m_extension;
5319 }
5320
5321 void setTemplateDir(const QCString &dirName)
5322 {
5323 m_templateDirName = dirName;
5324 }
5325
5326 private:
5327 std::unordered_map< std::string, std::unique_ptr<Template> > m_templateCache;
5328 //mutable int m_indent;
5329 TemplateEngine *m_engine = 0;
5330 std::vector<IncludeEntry> m_includeStack;
5331 QCString m_extension;
5332 QCString m_templateDirName;
5333};
5334
5335TemplateEngine::TemplateEngine() : p(std::make_unique<Private>(this))
5336{
5337}
5338
5339TemplateEngine::~TemplateEngine()
5340{
5341}
5342
5343std::unique_ptr<TemplateContext> TemplateEngine::createContext() const
5344{
5345 return std::make_unique<TemplateContextImpl>(this);
5346}
5347
5348Template *TemplateEngine::loadByName(const QCString &fileName,int line)
5349{
5350 return p->loadByName(fileName,line);
5351}
5352
5353void TemplateEngine::unload(Template *t)
5354{
5355 p->unload(t);
5356}
5357
5358void TemplateEngine::enterBlock(const QCString &fileName,const QCString &blockName,int line)
5359{
5360 p->enterBlock(fileName,blockName,line);
5361}
5362
5363void TemplateEngine::leaveBlock()
5364{
5365 p->leaveBlock();
5366}
5367
5368void TemplateEngine::printIncludeContext(const QCString &fileName,int line) const
5369{
5370 p->printIncludeContext(fileName,line);
5371}
5372
5373void TemplateEngine::setOutputExtension(const QCString &extension)
5374{
5375 p->setOutputExtension(extension);
5376}
5377
5378QCString TemplateEngine::outputExtension() const
5379{
5380 return p->outputExtension();
5381}
5382
5383void TemplateEngine::setTemplateDir(const QCString &dirName)
5384{
5385 p->setTemplateDir(dirName);
5386}
5387
5388//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5389
5390QCString TemplateVariant::listToString() const
5391{
5392 QCString result="[";
5393 const TemplateListIntfPtr list = toList();
5394 if (list)
5395 {
5396 bool first=true;
5397 TemplateVariant ve;
5398 TemplateListIntf::ConstIteratorPtr it = list->createIterator();
5399 for (it->toFirst();it->current(ve);it->toNext())
5400 {
5401 if (!first) result+=",\n";
5402 result+="'"+ve.toString()+"'";
5403 first=false;
5404 }
5405 }
5406 result+="]";
5407 return result;
5408}
5409
5410QCString TemplateVariant::structToString() const
5411{
5412 QCString result="{";
5413 const TemplateStructIntfPtr strukt = toStruct();
5414 if (strukt)
5415 {
5416 bool first=true;
5417 for (const auto &s : strukt->fields())
5418 {
5419 if (!first) result+=",";
5420 result+=s;
5421 if (!isWeakStruct()) // avoid endless recursion
5422 {
5423 result+=":'";
5424 result+=strukt->get(QCString(s)).toString();
5425 result+="'";
5426 }
5427 first=false;
5428 }
5429 }
5430 result+="}";
5431 return result;
5432}
